programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer joins the Stonecutters - a secret society responsible for just about everything that goes wrong in the world - and is hailed as their leader thanks to an ancient prophecy and a unequally shaped birthmark. Featuring the guest voice of Patrick Stewart

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Deacon snubs his buddies for a new black friend, so Doug swots up on African-American history in an effort to win him back. Meanwhile, Carrie tries to find out why her manicurist does not want her custom. Kevin James and Victor Williams star

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug is reluctantly persuaded to take Arthur with him to a basketball game in St Louis - but a delayed flight leaves them stranded in Pittsburgh

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug takes Deacon to lunch at a new cafe, but annoys the waitress so much she challenges him to a fight at the end of her shift. Meanwhile, Carrie invites Holly on a shopping trip - but only so she can use her van

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank has some anecdotes published in a magazine, sowing the seeds of grand writing ambitions. He approaches Ray's editor about becoming a columnist, but finds his way with words leaves a lot to be desired. Comedy, starring Peter Boyle

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie decides 40 years of marriage to Frank is enough for any woman and moves in with Ray - to the delight of Robert, who enjoys being mothered by her. Debra is unhappy with the situation and tries to persuade her father-in-law to apologise, but he is enjoying the single life too much to agree

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra's snooty parents announce they are going to pay a visit - much to the dismay of Ray, who pleads with Frank and Marie to be on their best behaviour and avoid embarrassing him. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray ignores Frank's advice and loses all his cash in a poker game. Debra urges him to ask for the money back, but he is too proud to beg his father for help. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink lands a job as guest host on a morning TV show, and finds himself considering a permanent move from radio. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: To Thine Old Self Be True
programme.desc: Niles finds out that Maris has put on weight while pining for him, and Frasier throws a bachelor party for Donny - but ends up handcuffed to a stripper. Starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by guests Bradley Riches, Dawn O'Porter, Adam Lambert, Louise Redknapp and Leila Farzad. With live music from soul singer Debbie

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Sideshow Bob thirsts for revenge on Krusty the Clown, vowing to kill his former employer for erasing tapes of the first 10 years of their TV show, and hypnotises Bart to do the dirty deed for him. Featuring the guest voices of Kelsey Grammer and Gary Coleman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart, Milhouse, Nelson and Ralph are 'discovered' by record producer LT Smash and recruited as singers in a boy band, but Lisa begins to suspect the mogul's motives may not be entirely above board. Featuring the guest voices of 'N Sync

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Blackfriars in Inverness. After an afternoon of crafting, two guests note that quality is lacking in their room, leading to some very strong words

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Singer Marilyn and her mum Agnes host the second visit of the week at Bogenraith House in Aberdeenshire where they're hoping to hit the high notes, but Dean and Chelsie are in an unforgiving mood after their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Pamela hosts the third visit of the week at Cairngorms Glamping in Aberdeenshire where most of her guests are tickled pink by the pods but one pair aren't happy campers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Lovat Hotel in Perth. Sharmin and Sarah are used to tackling big jobs at their expansive 35-room hostelry, but one of their guests finds fault with the facilities. Tension between the B&Bers mounts during a visit to a museum, and the breakfast set-up confuses everyone and leaves Sharmin and Sarah with some difficult-to-swallow scores in their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's a feisty old payment day after a week packed to the gills with gripes. The tension is almost tangible as the scores are revealed and the winner announced

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer focus on the layout issues and dilemmas that many developers face in a very different world. In this episode, the duo tackle future-proofing, as in Clifford in West Yorkshire, Vic and Paul Miller need help with their idyllic property, as do the Lindleys from Ashtead in Surrey

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a couple who are converting a rusty ship's wheelhouse into head-turning accommodation for their Welsh glampsite. In Scotland, George revisits a designer who he met on the first series to see a pair of his gorgeous new eco-builds. He ends his Denmark trip at a modernist home and finally gets to reveal his own amazing space - a cabin in the sky, built on an old scissor lift

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Lee McKenzie presents action from the seventh round of the season at Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya in Spain. This is an inaugural grand prix by name, but the Spanish Grand Prix, which has now moved to Madrid, was held here last year. Oscar Piastri took the honours in that race 12 months ago, with his McLaren teammate Lando Norris taking second. With analysis from David Coulthard and Billy Monger

programme.title: Free Nelson Mandela
programme.desc: Documentary about the South African leader's 27-year imprisonment during the apartheid era, and how he led his country to democracy from inside a cell. The first episode begins in the early 1960s, when Nelson Mandela led the fightback against the South African government and was imprisoned for life. Soon, a global anti-apartheid movement is taking the struggle worldwide, particularly after the murder of activist Steve Biko

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces, including the likes of Vernon Kay and Paddy McGuinness, Denise Van Outen and Johnny Vaughan, Vicky Pattison and Pete Wicks, Bez and Shaun Ryder, Ashley Banjo and Perri Kiely, Rylan and mum Linda, and Roman and Martin Kemp sit down to give their sharp, insightful and funny thoughts on the week's TV

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: The paramedics find a man experiencing a life-threatening diabetic hypoglycaemia. It takes the efforts of the fire service to reach the patient, and the only way is up a ladder and through an upstairs window. A woman with dangerously low oxygen levels is struggling to breathe, and sleepwalking may be the reason why an elderly woman has fallen and injured her side

programme.title: Boiling Point (2021)
programme.desc: A chef's life descends into chaos during one night at his fancy London restaurant as multiple personal and professional crises and a disastrous health inspection threaten to destroy everything he's worked for. Director Philip Barantini's drama, filmed in one continuous shot and which inspired the TV series. Starring Stephen Graham, Lauryn Ajufo, Vinette Robinson and Jason Flemyng

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's next stop is Philadelphia, where family run restaurant Chiarella's is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian eateries. Tommy and Dina Defino's marriage is on the verge of collapse and his sense of personal failure only adds to the troubles of their crisis-ridden business

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Albie the Jack Russell puppy has a second chance of a home with 10-year-old George - provided he can win over George's mum and dad. Duchess, a bassett hound, expects to be treated like a queen and retired businesswoman June may be just the person to meet her requirements. Mistreated lurcher Sam seeks some home comforts. He needs Leeds couple Laura and Martin to see past his size and find a place for him in their hearts

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Doctors discover Homer has had a crayon lodged in his brain since childhood and decide to remove it. The procedure instantly transforms him into a genius, but removes his ability to enjoy life

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Sideshow Bob thirsts for revenge on Krusty the Clown, vowing to kill his former employer for erasing tapes of the first 10 years of their TV show, and hypnotises Bart to do the dirty deed for him. Featuring the guest voices of Kelsey Grammer and Gary Coleman

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: With most of the house now built, Sarah and Graham focus their attentions on creating a family portrait wall. After taking a DNA test, Graham discovers some unexpected family history. Keen to transform 200 acres of grazing pasture into organic arable farmland, Sarah and Graham meet up with a local organic farmer to explore their options

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Mark Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliff is surprised to receive an offer he cannot refuse - especially since it comes from a woman he reported to the mail authorities. John Ratzenberger stars

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam sells his Corvette and suffers the humiliating consequences, while inexperienced boss Norm commiserates when he too is humbled by the new crew he hires to help out his booming business. Ted Danson and George Wendt star

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Lilith gives birth to the Cranes' first child, as the rest of the regulars celebrate the bar's 100th anniversary. Comedy, starring Bebe Neuwirth

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: In a bid to outdo Marie's culinary skills, Debra goes against tradition by serving a fish dish on Thanksgiving. Not to be upstaged, her meddling mother-in-law turns up with a turkey. Comedy, starring Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is ousted as captain of Nemo's basketball team, so Ray replaces him and begins devoting all his time to coaching - leading Debra to accuse him of neglecting the children

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

Drama, starring Amandla Stenberg, Regina Hall and Russell Hornsby

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

To make matters worse, the restaurant's food is less than appetising and its long-serving chef seems to be incompetent

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at Wharfe House in Wetherby, run by B&B newcomer Pauline Cox, who's joined by her best friend Claire Smith. Eyebrows are raised when Mike and Karen Hepker arrive from Bath Lodge Castle in a chauffeur-driven car. During a visit to a local vineyard, sparks fly between Mike Hepker and Tash Thorne, who runs The Old Lodge Hotel in Gosport with her partner Mike Pearce. Having only just opened, Pauline has a house full for the very first time. The narrow antique beds cause concerns and Jenny and Clive Aylett from Wortwell Hall Barn in Norfolk are first to criticise breakfast. When it comes to feedback, Pauline's left deflated by her sausage scores - and Karen and Mike Hepker vote with their feet

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners visit Wortwell Hall Barn in Norfolk, run by husband-and-wife duo Clive and Jenny Aylett, but when the pair's rivals arrive, Pauline Cox and Claire Smith have difficulty locating their favourite appliance. Publicans Mike Pearce and Tash Thorne are astonished to discover they cannot lock their room's door. In the morning, some of the guest make awkward requests to change their breakfast orders, causing professional chef Clive to experience a meltdown in the kitchen that leads to a fundamental error

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to Bath Lodge Castle in Somerset for the third day of the competition, where they are wowed by Karen and Mike Hepker's luxury castle experience. Although the guests are disappointed at the bathroom fixtures and fittings, they are given the chance to vent their emotions during an afternoon of painting in the castle grounds. Plus, tensions rise between Mike and Tash at dinner, and harsh comments at feedback lead the hosts to suspect game playing

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie reminisces about why she chose to marry Doug, but also learns some uncomfortable truths, while Danny falls for Holly after his girlfriend leaves him

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug bumps into his erstwhile football coach while delivering a parcel to his old high school, and Arthur loses his senses of sight, hearing and speech when his eye drops go missing. Comedy, guest starring Burt Reynolds with Kevin James and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: The King of Queens

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray gives the eulogy at a family funeral, but his Aunt Alda spoils the solemnity of the event by rekindling a seven-year-old feud with his mother. American comedy, starring Ray Romano and Jean Stapleton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert asks Ray and Debra to help with his criminal psychology course by taking IQ tests - but gives them misleading results to gauge their reactions

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart discovers a previously unknown comet while carrying out a punishment for Principal Skinner. Unfortunately, to the horror of all concerned, it is on a direct collision course with Springfield - and Flanders owns the only bomb shelter in town

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At Worlington Hall in Suffolk, married couple Louis and Michael lay on luxurious interiors and take their guests for a 'mill around a mill'. programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The holiday hosts meet one final time on payment day to clash over cleanliness and spar over sleep scores, before the payments are revealed and we find out who has won

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sandy and Andy dream of eventually retiring to the lakes and mountains of Lazio in Italy, but for now want to use a property there to share holidays with their sizable family of five children and six grandchildren. Danni Menzies works with a budget of £70,000 to hunt out a traditional-style house with plenty of space and a big enough garden to grow fruit and vegetables

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer are in Edinburgh helping house-hunters who want to be in the capital's most popular enclaves. Kirstie is with Northern Irishman Rob and his Mexican wife Maria, who want out of their noisy rented tenement flat, and into a house of their own where their one-year-old daughter Olivia can flourish. Phil is with James and Lesley, who is living with ME, or Chronic Fatigue Syndrome, which has affected their search. Lesley's condition impacts what they need in a property and also how often they've been able to go out to viewings, so Phil shows them various options that suit their future-proofing requirements

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp catches up with Kathleen and Tom to see how far they have come with the renovations to their four-bedroom Newcastle home. The couple first appeared on the show back in 2016 when their three-bedroom Victorian terrace in Gosforth, had become a four-year Love It or List It battleground. In 2019, Phil Spencer returned and learnt that the couple had made the leap to the spacious home they now reside in

programme.title: Channel 4 News

In Burton Constable, we discover the remains of an ocean giant washed up on the Holderness shoreline that appears in the literary classic Moby Dick. Glampsite owners Ed and Verity create a bespoke tent with glorious views of Whitby's gothic abbey

programme.title: Where the Crawdads Sing (2022)
programme.desc: Catherine 'Kya' Clark is a young woman who fends for herself in the Deep South. Chase Andrews courts her in opposition to his mother, but when he is found dead, the finger of suspicion points at Kya, so lawyer Tom Milton mounts a robust defence. Drama adapted from Delia Owens' bestseller, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, David Strathairn and Taylor John Smith

programme.title: Jojo Rabbit (2019)
programme.desc: A lonely German boy discovers that his single mother is hiding a Jewish girl in their attic. Aided only by his imaginary friend, Adolf Hitler, Jojo Rabbit must confront his blind nationalism as the Second World War continues to rage on. Taika Waititi wrote, directed and co-stars in this Oscar-winning comedy, featuring Roman Griffin Davis, Thomasin McKenzie, Rebel Wilson, Stephen Merchant and Scarlett Johansson

programme.title: Boiling Point (2021)
programme.desc: A chef's life descends into chaos during one night at his fancy London restaurant as multiple personal and professional crises and a disastrous health inspection threaten to destroy everything he's worked for. Director Philip Barantini's drama, filmed in one continuous shot and which inspired the TV series. Starring Stephen Graham, Lauryn Ajufo, Vinette Robinson and Jason Flemyng

programme.title: Iris Prize Best British Shorts
programme.desc: Jack Howard's short film nominated for the Iris Prize film award in 2025. A young waiter is confronted by a mysterious older woman on a rainy night

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Baltimore, Maryland, where Denise Whiting has alienated customers by trademarking the word 'hon', a term of endearment used by the local community. When she opened Café Hon in 1992 it was a roaring success, but as a result of Denise's unwavering business ambition, people started to boycott the restaurant, leaving her frustrated by falling sales

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: Loyal chauffeur Kabir wants the team to tell the life story of his boss, hard-working financier Mr Eblen Archer. Sam thinks it seems like such a heart-warming idea, until he realises there isn't much of a story to tell. However, Pat knows the rich and famous always have sordid secrets, so the team go in search of scandals their subject is involved in

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: A couple become trapped in an underground cave, so Sam and his crew respond immediately to the national emergency by planning a movie that they can send down to lift their spirits. However, to complicate matters, an actual rescue team are also on site, who keep getting in the movie-makers' way - and who might just save the couple before the movie is finished. Offbeat comedy, written by and starring Sam Campbell

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Comedian and podcaster Adam Buxton joins Joe Lycett to assess the wonders of Prague, capital of the Czech Republic. A kayak tour along the River Vltava allows them to take in the key sights, including the castle and the Charles Bridge. They then explore the work of sculptor David Cerný, whose controversial pieces adorn the city. Dinner is served at Levitate, where they eat their way through an 18-course tasting menu, including eating a sausage out of a skull and sampling caviar-laced ice-cream. On day two, the pair enjoy a beer spa before ascending the Zizkov TV Tower, for a bird's eye view of the city

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: Phoebe's frank attitude causes Monica and Rachel to lose their tempers. Joey reluctantly accepts a job as a waiter at Central Perk, while Ross and Chandler argue over which of them made up a raunchy joke

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel gives advice on being more independent to her pampered younger sister (Reese Witherspoon), who promptly makes her regret it by flirting with Ross. Meanwhile, Joey gets in trouble for giving free food to female customers at Central Perk

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Can't Cry
programme.desc: Phoebe accidentally becomes a porn icon, Rachel tries to stop her sister from embarking on a relationship with Ross, and Chandler reveals he is unable to cry. Guest starring Reese Witherspoon

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One That Could Have Been - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. A revelation from Rachel prompts the pals to ponder what might have been if their lives had taken different courses. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One That Could Have Been - Part Two
programme.desc: The second episode showing what could have happened to the gang members had their lives taken different paths. Carol and Ross decide to spice up their marriage, and Rachel catches Barry being unfaithful. Comedy, with David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler's home-made gift for Monica lands him in trouble. Joey hires a lookalike to help him participate in a medical study, and Ross demonstrates martial arts to Rachel and Phoebe. Comedy, starring Matthew Perry and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Dates a Student
programme.desc: A fire leaves Rachel and Phoebe homeless, forcing them to impose on their pals' hospitality. Meanwhile, Chandler gives Joey career advice, and Ross gets into trouble for dating a student. Comedy, with Matthew Perry and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross's girlfriend goes on a wild weekend away, leaving him to worry about what she is getting up to. Rachel longs for a date and Joey's fridge breaks down

programme.title: Three Men and a Baby (1987)
programme.desc: The lives of three flat-sharing bachelors are turned upside down when they discover a baby left on their doorstep. Unfortunately, while trying to get to grips with the necessary parenting skills, they find themselves menaced by criminals searching for missing drugs. Comedy, directed by Leonard Nimoy, starring Tom Selleck, Ted Danson, Steve Guttenberg and Nancy Travis

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The pair reach the final stop on their Latin America road trip as they arrive in Panama, where they spend time with local indigenous tribes and compete in ancestral games. When the duo reach the capital city, the skyscraper skyline is a big clue to what Barney has in store for his dad, and Brad is not pleased when he finds out they will be cleaning the windows of one of those skyscrapers. Finally, Bradley and Barney end their trip with a visit to meet Grammy Award-winning jazz musician, Danilo Pérez

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Mac and CHEESE
programme.desc: Joey auditions for a major TV show about a man and his crime-fighting robot, but Chandler almost ruins everything. Featuring clips from earlier episodes, starring Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, David Schwimmer, Matthew Perry and Matt LeBlanc

programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Meets Elizabeth's Dad

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Paul's the Man

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: An ecstatic Monica plans an evening out to celebrate her engagement to Chandler, but ends up accusing Rachel of trying to steal her thunder by kissing Ross. American comedy, starring Courteney Cox, Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica excitedly starts making preparations for her big day, only to discover her parents have spent all the wedding money on a beach house. Phoebe moves her massage parlour into Ross's apartment and Rachel's choice of reading matter raises eyebrows

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica tries to re-create a secret recipe belonging to Phoebe's grandmother, and Chandler accepts an invitation from future father-in-law Jack to play racquetball. Meanwhile, Rachel advises Joey on life on the ocean wave. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox

Guest starring Kristin Davis (Sex and the City)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Candy
programme.desc: Rachel gets a dressing-down at work for dating Tag, while Monica tries to buy her neighbours' friendship by making sweets for them - but finds their appetites to be greater than her desire to be popular

programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Can't Remember Which Sister

programme.sub-title: The One After Ross Says Rachel

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross and Rachel's attempt to explain how they ended up in bed together descends into an argument about who made the first move - until Ross shocks everyone by announcing he captured the whole encounter on videotape. David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston star

programme.sub-title: The One with the Princess Leia Fantasy

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Princess Leia Fantasy
programme.desc: Ross foolishly lets Rachel in on his most secret sexual fantasy, while Phoebe consoles a heartbroken Monica and Chandler gets involved with an old flame whom Joey cannot stand. David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Evil Orthodontist
programme.desc: Chandler finds it tough being ignored by a woman he has just taken out on a first date, and Rachel gets back with her double-dealing former fiance Barry - even though he is now engaged to someone else. Guest starring Jennifer Grey

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Doesn't Like Dogs
programme.desc: Rachel's assistant Tag spends Thanksgiving with the gang, leading to a series of embarrassing revelations, and a puppy smuggled into the flat by Phoebe unnerves Chandler. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Candy
programme.desc: Rachel gets a dressing-down at work for dating Tag, while Monica tries to buy her neighbours' friendship by making sweets for them - but finds their appetites to be greater than her desire to be popular

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Holiday Armadillo
programme.desc: Phoebe plans to return to her flat and tries desperately to persuade Rachel to join her, while Monica is infuriated by Chandler's inability to tip appropriately. Ross looks after Ben during the holiday season, and dresses as an armadillo to keep him entertained

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Cheesecakes
programme.desc: Phoebe's ex-boyfriend arrives back in town and Monica is angry at not being invited to her cousin's wedding. Chandler and Rachel feel guilty for eating a neighbour's cheesecake that was mistakenly delivered to their apartment. Comedy, guest starring Hank Azaria (The Simpsons)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where They're Up All Night
programme.desc: Ross and Joey get trapped on the roof while waiting to watch a meteor shower. Monica's exhaustion leads to trouble with Chandler, and Rachel argues with Tag over which of them failed to post a parcel

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The pair reach the final stop on their Latin America road trip as they arrive in Panama, where they spend time with local indigenous tribes and compete in ancestral games. When the duo reach the capital city, the skyscraper skyline is a big clue to what Barney has in store for his dad, and Brad is not pleased when he finds out they will be cleaning the windows of one of those skyscrapers. Finally, Bradley and Barney end their trip with a visit to meet Grammy Award-winning jazz musician, Danilo Pérez

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's The Wheel
programme.desc: Radio and TV presenter Rylan, former England footballer Peter Crouch and singer Nicole Scherzinger compete for charity - but only one of them will be in the middle of the wheel at the end of the show. Helping them along the way are seven celebrity experts - Abbey Clancy, Nigel Havers, Carol Vorderman, Aled Jones, Judi Love, Joe Marler and Scott Mills. They'll be answering questions on everything from pantos, toys and carols to Christmas hits, Christmas dinners and TV classic The Snowman

programme.title: 3 Men and a Little Lady (1990)
programme.desc: Bachelor Jack and his two best buddies have brought up his baby Mary since she was left in their care by her mother, Sylvia. Now that Mary is five years old, Sylvia believes she needs a more conventional upbringing and decides to accept a marriage proposal from an English aristocrat, leaving the trio of dads rushing to stop the wedding. Comedy sequel, with Tom Selleck, Ted Danson and Steve Guttenberg

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The hapless fool sits an exam, but when he realises he has studied the wrong maths equations, it is already too late. He also tries to stifle a sneeze in church. Rowan Atkinson stars in the first episode of the celebrated comedy, with Richard Briers, Rudolph Walker and Howard Goodall

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The buffoon wreaks havoc when he goes shopping and dines at an exclusive restaurant - and there is an unfortunate incident when he meets a member of the royal family at a film premiere. Rowan Atkinson stars

programme.title: Comedy Central Live
programme.desc: A stand-up performance in which the comedian explains what makes Britain so great, sets the mood for his philosophical musings, and wonders why sex is always better in a hotel

programme.title: Comedy Central Live
programme.desc: A stand-up special by the comedian, revealing the sharp wit and dirty mind behind his mild mannered demeanour

programme.desc: The government stalls the NBA's move to independent status and the staff undergo respect training, complicating a romance between Nat and a visiting consultant

programme.desc: Jennifer Poole's life tragically changed when she met a new man with a hidden past - who would go on to commit a brutal murder

programme.title: When Missing Turns to Murder
programme.desc: For years, Carole Packman's daughter Sam thought her mum had walked out. But the truth emerged when she heard her dad had gone missing

programme.title: When Missing Turns to Murder
programme.desc: The mother of Essex schoolgirl Danielle Jones speaks out about the 2001 murder of her 15-year-old daughter, whose body has never been found

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: Former detectives, victims' relatives and survivors reflect on the Real IRA car bombing that killed 29 people in Omagh, Northern Ireland, in 1998

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: Documentary examining the 2005 murder of 18-year-old model Sally Anne Bowman, who was sexually abused and repeatedly stabbed in her driveway in Croydon, south London. The convicted assailant, chef Mark Dixie, had denied the crime, claiming he stumbled across her body and engaged in sex before realising she was dead

programme.title: Interrogation Raw
programme.desc: Detectives hope a woman can identify her attacker as she fights for her life after being shot in the face, and investigators race to get a confession for a shooting in a car park

programme.title: Interrogation Raw
programme.desc: Dramatic murders are uncovered through suspects' questioning, expert interviews and gripping trial footage

programme.title: Interrogation Raw
programme.desc: True crime series exploring fascinating interrogations. Each episode captures the make-or-break moments that occurs within those four walls

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Police are called to the home of a Wall Street professional, whom they discover has been shot multiple times, with her partner nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programme.desc: A woman is found in her bathroom with a fatal gunshot wound to the head. Her death is ruled a suicide, but a tenacious investigator cracks the case wide open

programme.title: The Death Investigator with Barbara Butcher
programme.desc: A rookie homicide detective helps Barbara unravel how a seemingly straightforward crime conceals a chain of forensic contradictions

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: A cold case is solved 42 years after a 23-year-old teacher vanished the night before Easter after giving her confession

programme.title: Crime in Progress

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: Examining cold cases solved through advancements in DNA, along with help from victims' families, law enforcement and the public

programme.title: Rob Rinder: The Crime I Can't Forget
programme.desc: The presenter revisits one of the most haunting cases of his former career as a criminal barrister, reflecting on the events and examining his own role within them. As Rinder confronts the enduring emotional weight of the case, the film asks whether developments in the law, including the possibility of a trial in absence, might offer a route to further scrutiny of the evidence

programme.title: Accident, Suicide or Murder?

programme.title: Killer in Plain Sight

programme.title: Killer in Plain Sight

programme.title: Killer in Plain Sight
programme.desc: Tabloids talk of serial killers and cartels when a head is found in the Hollywood Hills. But it turns out, the murderer was far closer to home

programme.title: Killer in Plain Sight
programme.desc: Police have no end of suspects when a man's brutally dismembered body is found hidden in a plastic container in Phoenix, Arizona

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he meets husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who reveal a shocking contempt for customer feedback. programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay uses his wealth of experience in the restaurant business to help struggling hotels, motels and B&Bs across America. After identifying the most pressing issues at each location, he puts the owners and staff to work as he attempts to save their establishments from disaster. His first stop is Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, where the Roosevelt Inn is more than $1million in debt - and to make matters worse, the owner's wife has had enough

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the allegedly haunted Cambridge Hotel in New York, run by former military man John Imhof and his wife Tina. John runs the business like a dictatorship - an approach that is upsetting staff and sending guests straight for the exits. Will the chef be able to use his experience in the restaurant business to save this struggling establishment from disaster?

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. programme.title: The Simpsons

However, disaster strikes when he breaks the device, sending him spiralling back down into the depths of despair. But when Ned Flanders discovers the word 'Hope' written on a tree trunk in the Simpsons' garden, Homer believes it to be a miracle and his faith in life is restored - although newsman Kent Brockman isn't quite so convinced

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.desc: Homer unwittingly pollutes Lake Springfield, so the US government decides to isolate the city underneath a giant dome. The Simpsons manage to escape and plan to start a new life in Alaska - but learn Springfield is about to be destroyed, and return to save their friends. With the voices of Dan Castellaneta, Julie Kavner, Nancy Cartwright and Yeardley Smith

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version of Series 19 of the comedy game show. Little Alex Horne has sculpted another impression of Taskmaster Greg Davies' regal head from pure gold in readiness for a new series. That head is the most coveted prize in television - outside of the prizes in television that offer actual cash - so the new cohort of comics who are attempting to impress Greg by completing his bafflingly pointless tasks are all pretty desperate to claim it for themselves. The five stout-hearted souls who have willingly put their reputations on the line in search of glory are Fatiha El-Ghorri, Jason Mantzoukas, Mathew Baynton, Rosie Ramsey and Stevie Martin. All of them will approach the series with hope in their hearts, but after searching for cheese phones, dressing mannequins in wetsuits and striking powerful poses, four of them will exit broken and beaten, while only one will dance away pretending to be humble in the face of their truly incredible victory (while probably still feeling quite broken and beaten). In the first episode of the series, with his simpering secretary Alex Horne in tow, Taskmaster Greg Davies beckons a fresh quintet of quivering comics into his world of misrule. Their success in this series opener will rest on their skills in tasks involving vinegar, raisins and, as is traditional, peas

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. It's the grand final, and at the end of this episode, one of our five fabulous competitors will walk away with a trophy that looks very little like Greg Davies tucked under their arm. But before that, Amy Gledhill literally tears her hair out, Armando Iannucci plays the recorder while riding a trike with a plunger on his head, Joel Dommett sniffs the contents of a vacuum, Kumail Nanjiani mistreats a beloved resident of the Taskmaster house and Joanna Page lays waste to Little Alex Horne. Plus: the greatest pillow fights of all time! Once the dust, lint, fur and feathers have settled from all of that, Greg, with great regality, announces his brand-new champion. Exec Prods: Alex Horne, Richard Allen-Turner, Rob Aslett, Andy Devonshire, James Taylor, Jon Thoday; Series Prod: Andy Cartwright; Series Dir: Andy Devonshire; Prod Co: AvalonShort: It's the final! programme.desc: The comedian and Ninette head to cowboy country, where they saddle up for a mission to become real life ranchers

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Irreverent panel show, hosted by Jimmy Carr. Team captains Rob Beckett and Aisling Bea are joined by guest panellists Craig Revel Horwood, Alex Jones, Katherine Ryan and Dane Baptiste to answer questions based on opinion polls carried out around the country to see who best understands what is going on in Britain today

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Irreverent panel show, hosted by Jimmy Carr. Team captains Rob Beckett and Aisling Bea are joined by guest panellists Chris Kamara, Tom Davis, James Acaster and Tiff Stevenson to answer questions based on opinion polls carried out around the country to see who best understands what is going on in Britain today

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers on Holiday
programme.desc: The pop-up tattoo parlour in the sun gets a visit from Wezz, who needs help hiding his hideous Kardashian catastrophe. Plus, Alice gives Lana's silly emoji a facelift, while Glen sorts out Joey's truly offensive nipple tattoo

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Irreverent panel show, hosted by Jimmy Carr. Team captains Rob Beckett and Aisling Bea are joined by guest panellists Craig Revel Horwood, Alex Jones, Katherine Ryan and Dane Baptiste to answer questions based on opinion polls carried out around the country to see who best understands what is going on in Britain today

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Irreverent panel show, hosted by Jimmy Carr. Team captains Rob Beckett and Aisling Bea are joined by guest panellists Chris Kamara, Tom Davis, James Acaster and Tiff Stevenson to answer questions based on opinion polls carried out around the country to see who best understands what is going on in Britain today

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Cindy Galardi Culpepper, CEO and Chairperson of Wienerschnitzel, the world's largest hot dog chain, goes undercover in disguise to work among her own employees and find out about the quality of communication within the organisation. She hopes to discover what issues the staff might be having with the company in order to move it on to a brighter future

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Lowell Hawthorne, the President and CEO of Caribbean food producers Golden Krust, dons a disguise to go undercover among the workforce in his own company. Lowell has ambitious plans for expansion and takes the opportunity to work alongside a cashier, two chefs and a forklift operator to find out what state his business is in.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: An LA auction brings more competition than the buyers were expecting, and Dave Hester returns despite his chequered history

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers look for big bucks in Moreno Valley, Dave and Ivy fight over a pair of units and Maverick struggles to find a good unit at a fair price

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Lovebirds Gabz and Pete kick off the competition in and around Nottingham by cooking the food they fell in love eating together. Guests Sushma and Gulab, who have been married for 21 years, offer amusing relationship advice accompanied by strong opinions on the food. On day two Sushma and Gulab's traditional Indian banquet goes down a storm, at least until a sweet milky pudding arrives. Finally, country-dwelling partners John and Shaun serve up a home-grown menu, but not everything is as locally sourced as they had hoped

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: More singletons arrive at the restaurant in search of romance, including barber and football fanatic Matt, who is paired with fellow hairdresser Adele, and 23-year-old Max, who has a passion for linguistics but can never say the right thing when it comes to dating. Meanwhile, estate agent Leora is tired of being chatted up by cocky Chelsea boys and is in the market for a nice guy. Will Ben fit the bill?

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: More singletons arrive at the restaurant in search of romance, including barber and football fanatic Matt, who is paired with fellow hairdresser Adele, and 23-year-old Max, who has a passion for linguistics but can never say the right thing when it comes to dating. Meanwhile, estate agent Leora is tired of being chatted up by cocky Chelsea boys and is in the market for a nice guy. Will Ben fit the bill?

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: A huge change in the crew rocks the boat. A flirty love triangle heats up. And chef Josh struggles to cater to some very particular vegan guests

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Catching up with Jenna and Nathan, who worried he had made a huge mistake by planning a Mexican Day of the Dead wedding

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: The Most Handsome Boy on the Planet
programme.desc: Barry is excited when a model scout approaches him, but Erica thinks it's a scam. With the new year around the corner, Adam tries to get Murray to build some bridges with his own father, Pop Pop. Paul Sorvino guest stars.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray orders the cluttered garage be cleared out, although he insists on keeping one trunk that he is particularly sentimental about. Adam and Barry tease Erica mercilessly after discovering her old collection of New Kids on the Block memorabilia

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: As part of the 85th anniversary of DC's Batman, the teams have eight hours to create iconic vehicles for some of Batman's most notorious foes, to earn a spot in the semi-final. Each team is given an infamous Batman villain - from The Joker to Harley Quinn and Poison Ivy - and must construct a vehicle and a good-versus-evil Gotham City battle scene

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: Cal Wilson and Natalie Tran host as contestants don their aprons and hit the shed in a bid to be crowned Australia's best amateur baker. The judges are Rachel Khoo and Darren Purchese. Twelve keen bakers take on three cake-based challenges - a signature pull-apart cake made up of individually designed cupcakes, a technical passionfruit chiffon cake, and a birthday cake showstopper

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: While Claire and Haley fall ill at the same time, Phil wages battle against a defective smoke detector after concluding it is saying 'you're not a man' to him. Elsewhere, Manny accidentally gets one of Jay's employees dismissed. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he meets husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who reveal a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faces the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company, but can he get through to this defiant pair?

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay uses his wealth of experience in the restaurant business to help struggling hotels, motels and B&Bs across America. After identifying the most pressing issues at each location, he puts the owners and staff to work as he attempts to save their establishments from disaster. His first stop is Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, where the Roosevelt Inn is more than $1million in debt - and to make matters worse, the owner's wife has had enough

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the allegedly haunted Cambridge Hotel in New York, run by former military man John Imhof and his wife Tina. John runs the business like a dictatorship - an approach that is upsetting staff and sending guests straight for the exits. Will the chef be able to use his experience in the restaurant business to save this struggling establishment from disaster?

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay heads to Windsor, Vermont, on a mission to boost the fortunes of the Juniper Hill Inn, which may look impressive, but smells of raw sewage owing to a plumbing problem. After meeting the B&B's wealthy owner Robert Dean II, the chef uncovers some shocking treatment toward staff and realises he will need something approaching a miracle to save this business from disaster

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Homer and Marge are lost in an icy wilderness, they must push themselves to their limits to survive

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart, Martin and the bullies have to run for their lives when a weekend in the wilderness takes a dark turn

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: You Won't Believe What This Ep's About: Act 3 Will Shock You!
programme.desc: All of Springfield is outraged when Homer is accused of leaving Santa's Little Helper locked in a hot car

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer leads a rebellion of loser dads against the friendship between Bart and a child who is famous influencer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Cletus discovers that his wife Brandine has been hiding a secret love of learning

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa evades the security of the retirement home, and Homer and Marge set out to find him. Along the way, they discover intriguing details of his past, such as the time he worked alongside musician Marvin Hamlisch. The Oscar-winning composer guest stars as himself, in a role he recorded shortly before his death

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is surprised to learn that his accountant neighbour Dan works for Fat Tony - and has been asked to take the Mob boss's place while he serves time on a jury. Meanwhile, Lisa decides to add insects to her diet, but is plagued by a series of nightmares. With the voice of Steve Carell

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is down in the dumps, until Lisa wins him a hi-tech computer tablet in the school raffle - and it soon becomes impossible for him to put it down, as every waking minute he finds himself stroking or jabbing the shiny touchscreen. However, disaster strikes when he breaks the device, sending him spiralling back down into the depths of despair. But when Ned Flanders discovers the word 'Hope' written on a tree trunk in the Simpsons' garden, Homer believes it to be a miracle and his faith in life is restored - although newsman Kent Brockman isn't quite so convinced

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa are so disappointed by the latest Cosmic Wars film that they decide to visit creator Randall Curtis at his ranch in California. Meanwhile, Homer and Marge visit a vineyard - a jaunt that ends with a drunken Homer crashing the car and letting Marge face the consequences

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After wreaking havoc in a department store, Bart is sent to a juvenile detention centre, where he meets fellow tearaway Gina - who helps him plot his escape. With the guest voice of Sarah Michelle Gellar

programme.title: The Simpsons Movie (2007)
programme.desc: Homer unwittingly pollutes Lake Springfield, so the US government decides to isolate the city underneath a giant dome. The Simpsons manage to escape and plan to start a new life in Alaska - but learn Springfield is about to be destroyed, and return to save their friends. With the voices of Dan Castellaneta, Julie Kavner, Nancy Cartwright and Yeardley Smith

programme.title: Supercruising: Life at Sea
programme.desc: Documentary following life on the Holland America Line's luxury cruise ships MS Rotterdam and MS Nieuw Statendam as they take passengers on trips around the world. In this opening episode, security officer Rich Fontaine oversees nearly 3,000 passengers passing through his stringent security checks prior to exploring North Africa and Europe. Across in Florida, the sister ship is prepared to set sail around the Americas. First stop is a private island in the Bahamas, complete with a meticulously planned beach barbecue for thousands

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Rylan and his mother Linda, Denise van Outen and her boyfriend Eddie Boxshall, Chris Eubank Sr and Chris Eubank Jr, Stanley Johnson and Georgia 'Toff' Toffolo, Oti Mabuse and her sisters Motsie and Phemelo, Emily Atack and Kate Robbins, Gyles Brandreth and Sheila Hancock, and Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv critique the week's TV. Shows including including American Pie, The Graham Norton Show, Love Island, Natural World - Walrus: Two Tonne Tusker, Killing Eve, Blind Date, Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters, and The Family Brain Game come under their gaze. First shown in June 2019

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on The Masked Singer, Love Is Blind, Gladiators, Steal, Bargain Holiday Secrets, The Floor and ITV News

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Married at First Sight Australia, The Summit, LOL: Last One Laughing UK, Boarders, I Swear, Wheel of Fortune and Melania

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions to the Eurovision Song Contest, Bridgerton, Love Triangle Australia, Double the Money, Marcus Wareing Simply Provence, Narrow Escapes and news coverage of the Northern Lights being visible in British skies

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Train driver Dean admits he is terrible at reading signals when it comes to love. Will veterinary nurse Celine help him get his love life back on track? Ex-boy band member Jay and call centre manager Brett reveal surprising truths from their respective pasts, while primary school teacher Richard tries to win over criminal justice worker Jess with a letter from one of his pupils

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is forced to take down his festive decorations after Lisa is traumatised by Halloween Horror Night at Krustyland, but not everybody is understanding about it. Marge experiences difficulties when she takes Bart out to a trick-or-treating party

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on The Masked Singer, Love Is Blind, Gladiators, Steal, Bargain Holiday Secrets, The Floor and ITV News

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Married at First Sight Australia, The Summit, LOL: Last One Laughing UK, Boarders, I Swear, Wheel of Fortune and Melania

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gordon Ramsay continues to uncover problems at the Juniper Hill Inn in Windsor, Vermont. The chef tries to help the staff communicate with owners Robert and Ari, but after he catches one of them telling a shocking lie, will it be the final straw?

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As the school dance approaches, Erica asks Beverly to help her find Barry a date to keep him away from Lainey, but Beverly comes up with a candidate who surprises everyone. Meanwhile, Adam and Pops get into a huge argument. Allie Grant (Suburgatory) guest stars

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Imran and Leah send shockwaves through the village as they return hand-in-hand, and Cleo seeks encouragement on her first day back at work. A resident chooses forgiveness, Jack pleads with Beth, and things look up for the Keanes and Osbornes, but not everyone's happy. Leah has an idea after seeing sparks between two friends, and panic strikes a dad

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos, featuring weddings, space and sci-fi fans

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone gathers to celebrate Manny's birthday, but he is in the throes of a mini-crisis about getting older. Meanwhile, Phil and Claire engage in a car race, and Mitch and Cameron get sidetracked. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households, starring Rico Rodriguez, Ty Burrell and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron is delighted when his mother comes to visit, but her presence makes Mitchell feel uncomfortable. Meanwhile, Haley's decision to break up with Dylan hits Phil hard. Guest starring Celia Weston, with Eric Stonestreet and Jesse Tyler Ferguson

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Luke and Manny prepare for their first school dance, but the rest of the family seems more excited by the occasion. Meanwhile, Mitch and Cameron worry when Lily begins biting other children in the playground. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: In a feature-length episode, groom Andy plans an authentic Ukrainian wedding in fiancee Anna's homeland, hoping both she and her mother will be impressed with his efforts. Unknown to him, however, they are banking on a very British bash

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sandra Dee's, a seafood and barbecue restaurant in desperate need of a renovation in Sacramento, California. His team have just 24 hours to refurbish the establishment, and Gordon creates an exciting new menu by incorporating existing dishes and elevating them to a higher standard. Will returning customers be impressed by the changes?

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon visits the Trolley Stop Café, a classic Cajun-inspired restaurant in the heart of New Orleans, where things have gone badly off the rails. Gordon and his team have just 24 hours to clean and remodel the interior with streetcar-inspired decor and revamp the menu, working around the clock with the café's staff, who must learn how to prepare the new dishes and work together as a team. The customers are invited to return the next day to judge the changes

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Shanty on 19th, an iconic restaurant in the West End theatre district of Allentown, Pennsylvania, which has been a local presence for decades. However, its future success is under threat unless Gordon and his team can return the place to its former glory. They have just 24 hours to clean and remodel the interior as a bright and airy contemporary bistro that pays homage to the industrial history of its hometown and recreate the menu, working around the clock with the staff, who must learn how to make the new dishes and work together more effectively. The customers are asked to come back the next day to see the improvements. Will they think the new eatery is a star in the making?

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Vasi's Restaurant and Bar, a family-owned eatery in Waterbury, Connecticut, to implement some much-needed updates. He and his team have just 24 hours to clean and remodel the dated interior at a seaside Mediterranean taverna that fuses Greek and Italian heritage, and refresh the menu, working around the clock with Vasi's staff, who must learn how to work together to prepare the new dishes. The customers are then invited to return the next day, assess the changes and pass judgment

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa meets the son of musician Bleeding Gums Murphy and attempts to improve his life

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart is unable to control his feelings when he gets a new teacher, while Lisa befriends an octopus

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart faces a tough test at school when he gets a bullying new teacher who seems to want to crush his spirit, so the spiky-haired tearaway becomes determined to fight back. Meanwhile, the family attends a hippie-style community festival. With the guest voice of Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Dante's Peak (1997)
programme.desc: A vulcanologist's suspicions that a long-dormant volcano is about to erupt turn out to be true, prompting him to race against time to save the community standing in its way - and clash with local government officials weighing his predictions against the loss in tourism revenue. Disaster movie, starring Pierce Brosnan, Linda Hamilton, Elizabeth Hoffman and Charles Hallahan

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining 11 bakers are ready to rise to a new challenge - bread week. The contestants are tasked with creating identical breadsticks, with an extra something on the side, a braided zopf, and some scored and painted loaves

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A surprise from Marge's past has her bonding with Bart and terrifying Homer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa finds himself in a sticky situation when his hidden hamburger past comes back to haunt him

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Another trilogy of spooky stories originally broadcast at Halloween. A Mayan civilisation - with some very familiar-looking members - predicts the end of the world, and a scientific experiment in Springfield ends up lumbering the town with its very own black hole - which threatens to swallow everything and everyone in sight. Finally, a spot of time travel relocates Bart to 1974 for a Back to the Future parody in which he inadvertently jeopardises his parents' relationship

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge experiences mixed emotions when she is forced to replace the family car after an encounter with a sinkhole, while Bart becomes interested in Lisa's extracurricular activities after finding out about her covert meetings in town. With the guest voice of stock car racer Jeff Gordon

programme.title: Venom (2018)
programme.desc: While exploring space for new worlds, a probe belonging to the Life Foundation discovers a comet covered in symbiotic lifeforms. Following the probe's return to Earth, journalist Eddie Brock investigates sinister trials being carried out by the corporation, and after being infected by an alien symbiote, develops superhuman strength and power. Fantasy adventure, starring Tom Hardy and Riz Ahmed

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes 45-year-old twice-divorced Nicola, who is hoping one of the six naked men behind the screens has what it takes to be husband number three. Second up is Mark from London, who has Crohn's disease and hopes to regain some body confidence on the show

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Another naked newbie arrives, creating a huge test for one couple. Meanwhile, the daters without strong connections are also feeling vulnerable, leading to a jaw-dropping double dumping. Hosted by Rylan Clark

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: An omnibus edition of the two part-special for Stand Up to Cancer first shown in November 2023. Bob Mortimer and Richard Ayoade hit the sofa with Jennifer Saunders and Beattie Edmondson. And actors Stephen Graham and Hannah Walters tune in with their children Grace and Alfie. They watch The Great British Bake Off, Survivor, Planet Earth III, Made in Chelsea, No One Will Save You, Teen First Dates, and Harry and Elizabeth's Stand Up To Cancer stories

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes 45-year-old twice-divorced Nicola, who is hoping one of the six naked men behind the screens has what it takes to be husband number three. Second up is Mark from London, who has Crohn's disease and hopes to regain some body confidence on the show

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam passes on a family ring to convey his feelings for Dana, Beverly has difficulty accepting her son has such deep emotions at his tender age. Problems ensue when Lainey and Barry convince Murray to watch American football with Lainey's father. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Murray takes Erica's car privileges away, she and Barry buy a shabby second-hand van to get back at him. Meanwhile, when Adam objects to being voted 'nicest guy' in the school yearbook, he gets a suspension

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Inspired by the film Ferris Bueller's Day Off, Barry pretends to be ill so that he can avoid school and create an epic day of his own. However, his plans go awry when Adam has exactly the same idea. Charlie Sheen guest stars

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Imran and Leah send shockwaves through the village as they return hand-in-hand, and Cleo seeks encouragement on her first day back at work. A resident chooses forgiveness, Jack pleads with Beth, and things look up for the Keanes and Osbornes, but not everyone's happy. Leah has an idea after seeing sparks between two friends, and panic strikes a dad

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Things look up for the Keanes and Osbornes, but not everyone is happy. Leah has an idea after seeing sparks between two friends, and one dad panics

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three pairs of partners from east London compete to win the £1,000 prize, including Stephen and Andrew who present a cosy menu inspired by their love of all things homely. Also vying to win are beauty-lovers Rob and Abi who hope to impress their guests by cooking up some glamorous cuisine, before comedian duo James and Kate hope a surprise performance will help them secure the cash

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in at the 90-year-old Monticello Hotel in Longview, Washington, where owner Phillip Lovingfoss has an apparent liking for alcohol that some of his staff claim is threatening to destroy the business. The challenge of turning around the hotel's fortunes only increases when the chef sees shocking allegations about Phillip splashed all over the front page of the local newspaper

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: In Oregon, Gordon Ramsay tries to rescue the Applegate River Lodge, which is around $1million in debt. The chef questions whether owner Richard Davis's interest in smoking cannabis is distracting him from the problems at this family-built inn, and encounters Richard's sons Duke and Dusty, whose fiery relationship seems to prevent them from working together to tackle the establishment's financial troubles

programme.desc: Cletus discovers that his wife Brandine has been hiding a secret love of learning

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa evades the security of the retirement home, and Homer and Marge set out to find him. Along the way, they discover intriguing details of his past, such as the time he worked alongside musician Marvin Hamlisch. The Oscar-winning composer guest stars as himself, in a role he recorded shortly before his death

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is surprised to learn that his accountant neighbour Dan works for Fat Tony - and has been asked to take the Mob boss's place while he serves time on a jury. Meanwhile, Lisa decides to add insects to her diet, but is plagued by a series of nightmares. With the voice of Steve Carell

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is down in the dumps, until Lisa wins him a hi-tech computer tablet in the school raffle - and it soon becomes impossible for him to put it down, as every waking minute he finds himself stroking or jabbing the shiny touchscreen. However, disaster strikes when he breaks the device, sending him spiralling back down into the depths of despair. But when Ned Flanders discovers the word 'Hope' written on a tree trunk in the Simpsons' garden, Homer believes it to be a miracle and his faith in life is restored - although newsman Kent Brockman isn't quite so convinced

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa are so disappointed by the latest Cosmic Wars film that they decide to visit creator Randall Curtis at his ranch in California. Meanwhile, Homer and Marge visit a vineyard - a jaunt that ends with a drunken Homer crashing the car and letting Marge face the consequences

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After wreaking havoc in a department store, Bart is sent to a juvenile detention centre, where he meets fellow tearaway Gina - who helps him plot his escape. With the guest voice of Sarah Michelle Gellar

programme.title: The Simpsons Movie (2007)
programme.desc: Homer unwittingly pollutes Lake Springfield, so the US government decides to isolate the city underneath a giant dome. The Simpsons manage to escape and plan to start a new life in Alaska - but learn Springfield is about to be destroyed, and return to save their friends. With the voices of Dan Castellaneta, Julie Kavner, Nancy Cartwright and Yeardley Smith

programme.title: Supercruising: Life at Sea
programme.desc: Documentary following life on the Holland America Line's luxury cruise ships MS Rotterdam and MS Nieuw Statendam as they take passengers on trips around the world. In this opening episode, security officer Rich Fontaine oversees nearly 3,000 passengers passing through his stringent security checks prior to exploring North Africa and Europe. Across in Florida, the sister ship is prepared to set sail around the Americas. First stop is a private island in the Bahamas, complete with a meticulously planned beach barbecue for thousands

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Rylan and his mother Linda, Denise van Outen and her boyfriend Eddie Boxshall, Chris Eubank Sr and Chris Eubank Jr, Stanley Johnson and Georgia 'Toff' Toffolo, Oti Mabuse and her sisters Motsie and Phemelo, Emily Atack and Kate Robbins, Gyles Brandreth and Sheila Hancock, and Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv critique the week's TV. Shows including including American Pie, The Graham Norton Show, Love Island, Natural World - Walrus: Two Tonne Tusker, Killing Eve, Blind Date, Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters, and The Family Brain Game come under their gaze. First shown in June 2019

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions to the Eurovision Song Contest, Bridgerton, Love Triangle Australia, Double the Money, Marcus Wareing Simply Provence, Narrow Escapes and news coverage of the Northern Lights being visible in British skies

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Train driver Dean admits he is terrible at reading signals when it comes to love. Will veterinary nurse Celine help him get his love life back on track? Ex-boy band member Jay and call centre manager Brett reveal surprising truths from their respective pasts, while primary school teacher Richard tries to win over criminal justice worker Jess with a letter from one of his pupils

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is forced to take down his festive decorations after Lisa is traumatised by Halloween Horror Night at Krustyland, but not everybody is understanding about it. Marge experiences difficulties when she takes Bart out to a trick-or-treating party

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on The Masked Singer, Love Is Blind, Gladiators, Steal, Bargain Holiday Secrets, The Floor and ITV News

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gordon Ramsay continues to uncover problems at the Juniper Hill Inn in Windsor, Vermont. The chef tries to help the staff communicate with owners Robert and Ari, but after he catches one of them telling a shocking lie, will it be the final straw?

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As the school dance approaches, Erica asks Beverly to help her find Barry a date to keep him away from Lainey, but Beverly comes up with a candidate who surprises everyone. Meanwhile, Adam and Pops get into a huge argument. Allie Grant (Suburgatory) guest stars

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Imran and Leah send shockwaves through the village as they return hand-in-hand, and Cleo seeks encouragement on her first day back at work. A resident chooses forgiveness, Jack pleads with Beth, and things look up for the Keanes and Osbornes, but not everyone's happy. Leah has an idea after seeing sparks between two friends, and panic strikes a dad

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos, featuring weddings, space and sci-fi fans

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone gathers to celebrate Manny's birthday, but he is in the throes of a mini-crisis about getting older. Meanwhile, Phil and Claire engage in a car race, and Mitch and Cameron get sidetracked. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households, starring Rico Rodriguez, Ty Burrell and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron is delighted when his mother comes to visit, but her presence makes Mitchell feel uncomfortable. Meanwhile, Haley's decision to break up with Dylan hits Phil hard. Guest starring Celia Weston, with Eric Stonestreet and Jesse Tyler Ferguson

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Luke and Manny prepare for their first school dance, but the rest of the family seems more excited by the occasion. Meanwhile, Mitch and Cameron worry when Lily begins biting other children in the playground. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: In a feature-length episode, groom Andy plans an authentic Ukrainian wedding in fiancee Anna's homeland, hoping both she and her mother will be impressed with his efforts. Unknown to him, however, they are banking on a very British bash

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sandra Dee's, a seafood and barbecue restaurant in desperate need of a renovation in Sacramento, California. His team have just 24 hours to refurbish the establishment, and Gordon creates an exciting new menu by incorporating existing dishes and elevating them to a higher standard. Will returning customers be impressed by the changes?

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon visits the Trolley Stop Café, a classic Cajun-inspired restaurant in the heart of New Orleans, where things have gone badly off the rails. Gordon and his team have just 24 hours to clean and remodel the interior with streetcar-inspired decor and revamp the menu, working around the clock with the café's staff, who must learn how to prepare the new dishes and work together as a team. The customers are invited to return the next day to judge the changes

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Shanty on 19th, an iconic restaurant in the West End theatre district of Allentown, Pennsylvania, which has been a local presence for decades. However, its future success is under threat unless Gordon and his team can return the place to its former glory. They have just 24 hours to clean and remodel the interior as a bright and airy contemporary bistro that pays homage to the industrial history of its hometown and recreate the menu, working around the clock with the staff, who must learn how to make the new dishes and work together more effectively. The customers are asked to come back the next day to see the improvements. Will they think the new eatery is a star in the making?

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Vasi's Restaurant and Bar, a family-owned eatery in Waterbury, Connecticut, to implement some much-needed updates. He and his team have just 24 hours to clean and remodel the dated interior at a seaside Mediterranean taverna that fuses Greek and Italian heritage, and refresh the menu, working around the clock with Vasi's staff, who must learn how to work together to prepare the new dishes. The customers are then invited to return the next day, assess the changes and pass judgment

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa meets the son of musician Bleeding Gums Murphy and attempts to improve his life

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart is unable to control his feelings when he gets a new teacher, while Lisa befriends an octopus

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart faces a tough test at school when he gets a bullying new teacher who seems to want to crush his spirit, so the spiky-haired tearaway becomes determined to fight back. Meanwhile, the family attends a hippie-style community festival. With the guest voice of Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Dante's Peak (1997)
programme.desc: A vulcanologist's suspicions that a long-dormant volcano is about to erupt turn out to be true, prompting him to race against time to save the community standing in its way - and clash with local government officials weighing his predictions against the loss in tourism revenue. Disaster movie, starring Pierce Brosnan, Linda Hamilton, Elizabeth Hoffman and Charles Hallahan

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining 11 bakers are ready to rise to a new challenge - bread week. The contestants are tasked with creating identical breadsticks, with an extra something on the side, a braided zopf, and some scored and painted loaves

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A surprise from Marge's past has her bonding with Bart and terrifying Homer

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Another trilogy of spooky stories originally broadcast at Halloween. A Mayan civilisation - with some very familiar-looking members - predicts the end of the world, and a scientific experiment in Springfield ends up lumbering the town with its very own black hole - which threatens to swallow everything and everyone in sight. Finally, a spot of time travel relocates Bart to 1974 for a Back to the Future parody in which he inadvertently jeopardises his parents' relationship

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge experiences mixed emotions when she is forced to replace the family car after an encounter with a sinkhole, while Bart becomes interested in Lisa's extracurricular activities after finding out about her covert meetings in town. With the guest voice of stock car racer Jeff Gordon

programme.title: Venom (2018)
programme.desc: While exploring space for new worlds, a probe belonging to the Life Foundation discovers a comet covered in symbiotic lifeforms. Following the probe's return to Earth, journalist Eddie Brock investigates sinister trials being carried out by the corporation, and after being infected by an alien symbiote, develops superhuman strength and power. Fantasy adventure, starring Tom Hardy and Riz Ahmed

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes 45-year-old twice-divorced Nicola, who is hoping one of the six naked men behind the screens has what it takes to be husband number three. Second up is Mark from London, who has Crohn's disease and hopes to regain some body confidence on the show

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Another naked newbie arrives, creating a huge test for one couple. Meanwhile, the daters without strong connections are also feeling vulnerable, leading to a jaw-dropping double dumping. Hosted by Rylan Clark

programme.desc: An omnibus edition of the two part-special for Stand Up to Cancer first shown in November 2023.
