Meanwhile, Sir Benjamin Slade hopes a murder mystery weekend at Maunsel House in Somerset will help pay off a sizeable electricity bill

programme.title: Richard E Grant's Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor explores Berlin, visiting the arty Propeller Island City Lodge - a hotel where guests can fulfil their fantasies by sleeping in lion cages, coffins or rotating beds. At the Schlosshotel in affluent Grunewald, cabaret dancer Romy Haag talks to Richard about her affair with David Bowie, who stayed at the hotel while living in the German capital in the 1970s

programme.title: Richard E Grant's Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor heads to New Orleans and meets soul singer Irma Thomas at the Hotel de Monteleone, an establishment that was popular with writers such as Tennessee Williams, F Scott Fitzgerald and Ernest Hemingway. Richard speaks to Steel Magnolias author Robert Harling about the Soniat House, check into the supposedly haunted Hotel Maison de Ville and talks to burlesque dancer Chrissy Owens at the Roosevelt

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: In the opening episode, Chuck receives a mandate from a new boss and Axe braves a hard choice following a recent accusation

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Chuck tries to cash in a favour owed to him by an honourable judge. Meanwhile, Wendy helps Taylor weather their first major crisis

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Chuck faces a dilemma when he is given a perverse directive. Taylor and Wags interview a different type of Axe Capital employee

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Axe explores the new arena of venture philanthropy, while Chuck tries to reconcile with his father. Elsewhere, Wags pursues an intensely personal real estate acquisition

programme.title: The Miniature Wife
programme.sub-title: Lady Tomato and Mr F Tomato-Head
programme.desc: Lindy Littlejohn is shrunk to a height of six inches in a technological mishap and is forced to re-evaluate her relationship with husband Les. leading to battle for power. Romantic sci-fi comedy drama, starring Elizabeth Banks and Matthew Macfadyen

programme.title: The Miniature Wife
programme.desc: Lindy adjusts to life by exploring Lulu's doll's house, while Les works to find a way to make her big again, but neither are prepared to face their biggest obstacle of corporate red tape. Romantic sci-fi comedy drama, starring Elizabeth Banks and Matthew Macfadyen

programme.title: The Miniature Wife
programme.sub-title: What Category Is Shrinking Your Wife?
programme.desc: While Les devises ways to test his regrowth formula, his colleague has other plans to rescue Lindy. The couple's daughter's untimely arrival home from college for the holidays leaves Les scrambling to come up with an excuse for Lindy's absence

programme.title: The Miniature Wife
programme.desc: RPW takes Lindy on a romantic date to show her he is truly there for her, but her plagiarism scandal looms in the background. Lulu gets a glimpse at what life would be like back in her home town

programme.title: The Miniature Wife
programme.desc: Les grows concerned that Hilton's involvement in his company is due to ulterior financial motives. Lindy's plagiarised short story is published in the New Yorker to great critical acclaim, so Terry works to keep the real author quiet

programme.title: The Miniature Wife
programme.desc: Les discovers RPW and Lindy in a compromising position, while Lulu decides to expose her mother's plagiarism on the internet, becoming a hero for the day. Les is forced to fake his regrowth technology at a New Year's Eve party for Hilton

programme.title: The Miniature Wife
programme.desc: Psychological warfare begins as Lindy becomes convinced that Les will never find a way to make her big again. When Jackie strikes a deal to give Lindy the credit for her short story, Lulu discovers how the internet can turn someone from hero to villain

programme.title: The Miniature Wife
programme.sub-title: Gone into the Heart of Darkness
programme.desc: Lulu faces the college board and must make a decision about her future, and Martin discovers Hilton's plans for the research and tries to warn Les before their life's work is lost

programme.title: The Miniature Wife
programme.desc: Time rewinds to look back on the wedding day of Les and Lindy 20 years earlier, when the couple got a rude awakening at what family life could look like if they followed in their parents' footsteps

programme.title: The Miniature Wife
programme.desc: With the regrowth formula near completion, Les must break back into the lab to save his wife. Lulu returns from her board review having made a big decision about her future

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: In the midst of a brutal storm, Danvers and Navarro find themselves stuck at Tsalal with no electricity or means of contact. As the truth about what happened to Annie and the Tsalal men unfolds, Navarro and Danvers each confront the demons from their past.

programme.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
programme.desc: After landing himself in the Targaryens' crosshairs, Dunk exercises his right to request a trial by combat. However, Aerion insists on a trial of seven instead, so Dunk is faced with the daunting task of finding six others to fight alongside him

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Al is furious when Cy Tolliver appears in Deadwood planning to open a rival brothel, and vows to find out who helped the crafty businessman sneak into town. Meanwhile, Brom Garrett confronts the saloon owner over his dud gold claim. Starring Ian McShane, Timothy Olyphant and Molly Parker

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: First episode of the drama set in a lawless US town in the aftermath of Little Big Horn, where everyone's a gold digger, from hopeful prospectors to the saloon hookers. Former Montana marshal Seth Bullock relocates to a gold-mining camp known as Deadwood in Dakota Territory, looking to start a hardware business with his partner, Sol Star. Starring Ian McShane as ruthless saloon owner Al Swearengen, Timothy Olyphant as store manager Seth Bullock and Molly Parker as Alma Garrett

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Calamity Jane and Doc Cochran care for the little girl who survived the massacre, as suspicions arise that the Indians may not have been to blame. Hickok asks Bullock for protection in a high-stakes poker game, and Tom Mason is determined to exact his revenge. Starring Ian McShane, Timothy Olyphant and Nick Offerman

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Everyday life at Northumberland's Chillingham Castle, where the members of staff try to tactfully deal with the whims of their employer, baronet Humphry Wakefield, as the estate prepares to welcome a band of ghost-hunting tourists. Meanwhile, Carlton Towers in North Yorkshire hosts an annual dog show for Afghan hounds

programme.title: Sort Of
programme.desc: Raffo finds herself at an emotional edge, while Wolf surprises Sabi with a gift. 7ven and Mackenzie organise a party, before shutting it down

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Fitzalan Howard try to impress American guests at Carlton Towers with a programme of traditional activities, including skinning rabbits and taking high tea. Meanwhile, Sir Humphry Wakefield entertains tourists on a wine-tasting weekend at Chillingham Castle

programme.title: Richard E Grant's Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor heads to Tokyo and checks out the Park Hyatt, the hotel featured in the film Lost in Translation, and goes behind the closed doors of the Japanese capital's love hotels. In the fashionable district of Meguro, Richard takes in the Claska, which was the city's first boutique hotel and has its own canine beauty salon

programme.title: Richard E Grant's Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: Richard E Grant travels to Venice, said to be the city with the highest concentration of luxury hotels on the planet. He discovers how a measuring error led to the building of the city's biggest swimming pool, tries out a 15,000 euro-a-night royal suite whose bed has been slept in by everyone from the Beckhams to Prince Charles and the Duchess of Cornwall, and visits a hotel that keeps its doors open even when water floods to knee height. He also finds out why breaking a window once earned Ernest Hemingway a 10 per cent discount on his room

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Axe and Chuck fight for the loyalty of the same witness. Taylor travels to Silicon Valley to explore new business opportunities

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Axe tracks down a critical piece of evidence that could destroy him, and the Ice Juice case comes to a head when a judge gives Connerty a difficult deadline

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: It is Easter morning 1883 and Bertha Russell receives news that her bid for a box at the Academy of Music has been rejected. The return of the period drama, starring Carrie Coon and Louisa Jacobson

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: Peggy gets welcomed back to 61st Street by almost everyone, while George informs Oscar of his decision and sends Clay to meet with union leader Mr Henderson at his steel mill

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: The opera war escalates, there is a surprise guest at Bertha's fundraiser, and Peggy offers to cover the Tuskegee story. Ada hosts a luncheon for Mr Forte, George woos Henderson and Watson mulls over a proposal

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: After receiving discouraging news about the Met, Bertha deals with rumours that are swirling around about Larry. Fearing her sister's disapproval, Ada asks Marian to cover for her as she continues to see Mr Forte. Bertha vies for position with the visiting Duke of Buckingham, and, in Tuskegee, Peggy navigates a tense dinner with Mr Fortune and Booker T Washington in Tuskegee

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: After sharing her news, Ada questions moving ahead without Agnes's support, while Peggy experiences the dangers of the South

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: George heads to Pittsburgh to deal with the potential strike, while Bertha learns that the Duke will return for the Metropolitan Opera's opening night. Bannister tries to retrieve an incriminating letter from the Russell house

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: Bertha begins to rethink her loyalty to the Metropolitan Opera, an engagement party leaves Marian full of doubts, and George strikes a deal with union leader Bill Henderson

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.sub-title: In Terms of Winning and Losing
programme.desc: The staff ponder their future at Rhijn's house as Peggy questions her own at the New York Globe. Marian confesses her true feelings to Dashiell and the opera war reaches its climax.

programme.title: The Gilded Age

programme.title: Task
programme.desc: After scaling back his role in the FBI and still reeling from a family tragedy, Special Agent Tom Brandis reluctantly returns to the field to head a new, relatively inexperienced team to investigate a string of robberies in Philadelphia. Following his brother's death, Robbie Prendergrast earns extra cash for his family by ripping off drug dealers - but a bad tip upends his delicate balance. Crime drama, starring Mark Ruffalo

programme.title: The Fear Index
programme.desc: A fatal plane crash causes airline stocks to plummet. Alex harbours his own concerns when he finds terrorist websites open on his computer

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: Old accusations resurface as Jackie and Bull must put aside years of mistrust before the town's tensions ignite into violence. Crime drama, starring Kelly Reilly and Rafe Spall

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: After learning there's a Late Night vacancy, Deborah makes sure everything - and everyone - is operating at its finest for her roast. Comedy drama, starring Jean Smart, Hannah Einbinder and Carl Clemons-Hopkins

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: As negotiations with the duke start to disintegrate, George confronts Bertha about her vision for Gladys and its inadvertent impact on his business. Meanwhile, the Scotts meet the Kirklands in Newport, Ada encourages the staff to sign a temperance pledge, Agnes laments her slow exclusion from society, and Larry invites Jack to a meeting with a potential investor

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Alma enlists Hickok's help in an attempt to get to the bottom of her husband's death. However, there is also a plot being made against Bill's own life

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: The trial of Jack McCall continues as the jury retire to mull over the evidence they have heard. Elsewhere, the townsfolk lay the outlaw Wild Bill to rest, and Bullock decides to take the law into his own hands

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: The smallpox virus threatens the very existence of the inhabitants of Deadwood, as it engulfs the entire town and leaves no one well enough to go and get any medicine. Meanwhile, Swearengen is still after Alma's gold claim

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: The Penningtons, owners of Muncaster Castle in the Lake District, discuss the challenges of housing three generations of their family under one roof, while elderly patriarch Patrick struggles to find new purpose following the death of his wife. At Maunsel House in Somerset, Sir Benjamin Slade's preconceptions are challenged when a gay men's choir arrives for a weekend break

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: At Northumberland's Chillingham Castle, Sir Humphrey Wakefield prepares to hand over the estate to his apprehensive son Maximilian. Hard-working staff at Carlton Towers in North Yorkshire get ready for the arrival of 120 caravan owners for the annual rally and dinner dance

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Life in the Devon fishing port of Brixham. Spring is in the air, and the town is a hive of activity as skippers return their pleasure yachts to the water after winter in the dry dock, while the pressure is on for Brixham to look its best for the arrival of Princess Anne, who will officially open the new £20million fish market, and the start of the summer season

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham hosts its annual Pirate Festival, paying tribute to Devon's colourful maritime history, while fisherman Nathan sets off in search of a lucrative catch

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Detectives Munch and Gharty investigate the case of a basketball star found shot dead, and find themselves wondering whether he really was the wholesome character he appeared. Meanwhile, Pembleton and Bayliss crack an old case and Kellerman receives good news for a change

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Two women are found strangled, and evidence shows that on the night of their death they were bought drinks by a married couple

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: After learning there's a Late Night vacancy, Deborah makes sure everything - and everyone - is operating at its finest for her roast. Comedy drama, starring Jean Smart, Hannah Einbinder and Carl Clemons-Hopkins

programme.title: Empire of the Sun (1987)
programme.desc: An English boy living in Shanghai is separated from his parents during the Japanese invasion and forced to live on the streets. The youngster is befriended by an American sailor, who helps the boy adapt to life without his family, before the pair are eventually captured and subjected to the terrors of internment. Steven Spielberg's Second World War drama based on JG Ballard's semi-autobiographical novel, starring Christian Bale, John Malkovich and Nigel Havers

programme.title: Pacific Rim (2013)
programme.desc: A rift between dimensions opens up at the bottom of the Pacific ocean, and Earth is invaded by gigantic alien monsters. Equally massive robots, each controlled by two human pilots with their minds linked, are created to fight back against the creatures. Sci-fi adventure, starring Charlie Hunnam, Rinko Kikuchi and Idris Elba

programme.title: Mousehunt (1997)
programme.desc: Two destitute brothers stand to make a fortune by auctioning off the family home, but before the sale can be finalised they face the task of evicting its resident mouse. However, the resourceful rodent would rather stay put, and outwits their every bungling attempt to oust it. Slapstick comedy, starring Lee Evans, Nathan Lane and Christopher Walken

programme.title: Corpse Bride (2005)
programme.desc: Shy bridegroom Victor unintentionally gets himself hitched to a ghostly bride, who lures him down into the netherworld. But as he strives to find his way back to the land of the living, a treacherous aristocrat is scheming to marry Victor's flesh-and-blood fiancee. Tim Burton's stop-motion animated fantasy, with the voices of Johnny Depp, Helena Bonham Carter, Emily Watson, Christopher Lee and Richard E Grant

programme.title: Hook (1991)
programme.desc: Peter Pan, who has finally grown up and is now a married lawyer with a family of his own, is whisked away by Tinkerbell to Neverland, where he must learn to fly again if he is to save his children from the clutches of Captain Hook. Steven Spielberg's fantasy adventure, with Robin Williams, Dustin Hoffman, Julia Roberts, Bob Hoskins and Maggie Smith

programme.title: The BFG (2016)
programme.desc: An orphaned girl befriends a benevolent giant, who takes her off to a magical land, where they attempt to stop the man-eating creatures that are invading the human world. Steven Spielberg's fantasy adventure based on Roald Dahl's book, starring Mark Rylance, Ruby Barnhill and Penelope Wilton

programme.title: Jurassic Park (1993)
programme.desc: Scientists are given a sneak preview of a safari park inhabited by genetically engineered dinosaurs created by an eccentric tycoon. However, it all goes wrong when a greedy employee sabotages the security systems, allowing the prehistoric beasts to roam free and hunt the visitors. Steven Spielberg's action adventure, starring Sam Neill, Laura Dern, Jeff Goldblum, Richard Attenborough and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park (1997)
programme.desc: Scientist Dr Ian Malcolm reluctantly joins a research team on the island where his employer first designed genetically engineered dinosaurs. Meanwhile, a big-game hunter takes the chance to bag the biggest prize of all - a Tyrannosaurus rex. Steven Spielberg's dinosaur adventure sequel, starring Jeff Goldblum, Julianne Moore, Pete Postlethwaite and Richard Attenborough

programme.title: E.T.: The Extra-Terrestrial (1982)
programme.desc: A lonely boy befriends an alien who has been left stranded on Earth. The two develop a psychic connection as the boy helps the extraterrestrial to contact his own people and call for rescue. However, living on Earth starts to have a devastating effect on the visitor's health, and a government operative is determined to capture him for study. Steven Spielberg's sci-fi fantasy, starring Henry Thomas, Drew Barrymore, Dee Wallace and Peter Coyote

programme.title: Jaws (1975)
programme.desc: A New England seaside town's tourist season is turned into a nightmare by a giant killer shark. The local police chief's efforts to protect the public are thwarted by the greedy mayor, forcing him to join forces with a grizzled fisherman and an enthusiastic marine biologist to hunt and kill the monster predator. Steven Spielberg's blockbusting thriller, starring Roy Scheider, Richard Dreyfuss and Robert Shaw, with an Oscar-winning score by John Williams. The film also won Academy Awards for Best Sound and Best Film Editing

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can (2002)
programme.desc: The story of Frank Abagnale Jr, who found notoriety as a teenager conning and charming his way across America. Posing as a pilot, a doctor and a lawyer, Frank was able to fund an extravagant lifestyle while outwitting the FBI at every turn. Fact-based drama, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Tom Hanks, Christopher Walken, Martin Sheen and James Brolin

programme.title: Anora (2024)
programme.desc: A sex worker marries the son of an oligarch, but his family in Russia try to get the marriage annulled. Writer/director Sean Baker's Oscar-winning romantic comedy, starring Mikey Madison, Paul Weissman and Lindsey Normington

programme.title: Presence (2024)
programme.desc: A family become convinced they are not alone after moving into their new home in the suburbs. Steven Soderbergh's horror thriller, starring Lucy Liu, Chris Sullivan, Callina Liang and Eddy Maday

programme.title: The Cinema List: Spielberg
programme.desc: This edition of the Cinema List celebrates Steven Spielberg. From the new Disclosure Day to Jurassic Park, these blockbuster adventures are top tier

programme.desc: The story of Frank Abagnale Jr, who found notoriety as a teenager conning and charming his way across America. Posing as a pilot, a doctor and a lawyer, Frank was able to fund an extravagant lifestyle while outwitting the FBI at every turn. Fact-based drama, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Tom Hanks, Christopher Walken, Martin Sheen and James Brolin

programme.title: The Post (2017)
programme.desc: In 1971, an American military analyst uncovers the depths of the US government's deceptions about the futility of the Vietnam War, and takes action by copying top-secret documents that would become the Pentagon Papers. Washington Post owner Kay Graham and her editor Ben Bradlee discover The New York Times is preparing an explosive expose on those papers and, determined to compete, set out to publish them first. Steven Spielberg's fact-based drama, starring Meryl Streep, Tom Hanks, Sarah Paulson and Bob Odenkirk

programme.title: Erin Brockovich (2000)
programme.desc: A single mother desperate for work pleads her way into a routine administrative job at a law firm. It is not long before she stumbles across mislaid documents about a case brought against a corporation for poisoning the residents of a small town by contaminating their water supply. Realising something is amiss, she begins her own investigation. Fact-based drama, with Julia Roberts in an Oscar-winning role, alongside Albert Finney and Aaron Eckhart

programme.title: Eddington (2025)
programme.desc: A stand-off between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbours are pitted against each other in Eddington, New Mexico. Modern-day Western, starring Joaquin Phoenix, Emma Stone and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Black Bag (2025)
programme.desc: When a spy is suspected of treason, her husband faces the ultimate test - loyalty to his marriage or his country. Director Steven Soderbergh's thriller, starring Michael Fassbender, Cate Blanchett and Rege-Jean Page

programme.title: The Cinema List: Spielberg
programme.desc: This edition of the Cinema List celebrates Steven Spielberg. From the new Disclosure Day to Jurassic Park, these blockbuster adventures are top tier

programme.desc: A family become convinced they are not alone after moving into their new home in the suburbs. Steven Soderbergh's horror thriller, starring Lucy Liu, Chris Sullivan, Callina Liang and Eddy Maday

programme.title: Through a Glass Darkly (1961)
programme.desc: A former mental institution inmate returns to her family, but faces an uphill struggle to readjust to life in the outside world. Ingmar Bergman's drama, starring Harriet Andersson and Max von Sydow. In Swedish

programme.title: Fanny and Alexander (1982)
programme.desc: Ingmar Bergman's Oscar-winning semi-autobiographical drama follows the lives of two children from a theatrical family in turn of the century Sweden. Their carefree lives are thrown into upheaval by the death of their father and their mother's subsequent remarriage to a puritanical minister. But refuge from their joyless new home comes in the shape of their grandmother and her lover. Starring Pernilla Allwin, Bertil Guve, Gunn Wallgren and Lena Olin

programme.title: One Last Deal (2026)
programme.desc: A veteran sports agent scrambles to land one last high-stakes deal for his star client, with both their futures on the line. Drama, starring Danny Dyer and Elliott Rogers

programme.title: Him
programme.desc: Cameron Cade is predicted to be the next great quarterback of American football. During a night-time training session, he suffers a traumatic brain injury. Cameron agrees to attend a week-long boot camp run by retiring star quarterback Isaiah White at his secluded desert compound. However, Cade's life soon turns into a nightmare. Supernatural horror, starring Marlon Wayans and Tyriq Withers

programme.title: The Bride! (2026)
programme.desc: In 1930s Chicago, maverick scientist Dr Euphronius gives life to a murdered woman, sparking romance, police interest and radical change. Writer/director Maggie Gyllenhaal's horror based on The Bride of Frankenstein, starring Jessie Buckley, Christian Bale and Annette Bening

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie (2025)
programme.desc: When Gabby's prized dollhouse ends up with eccentric cat lady Vera, the youngster embarks on a adventure to reunite the Gabby Cats and retrieve her beloved diorama before it's too late. Comedy adventure, starring Laila Lockhart Kraner and Kristen Wiig

programme.title: They Will Kill You (2026)
programme.desc: A woman takes a job as a housekeeper in a New York City high-rise, unaware of the building's history of disappearances. She soon realises the community is shrouded in mystery. Comedy horror, starring Zazie Beetz, Myha'la, Paterson Joseph and Tom Felton

programme.title: Fuze (2026)
programme.desc: An unexploded Second World War bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation. Drama, starring Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Theo James, Gugu Mbatha-Raw and Sam Worthington

programme.title: Sisu: Road to Revenge (2025)
programme.desc: During the Second World War, Finland reluctantly cedes territory to the invading Red Army. Former Army commando Aatami Korpi is among the affected and returns to his family plot to deconstruct his timber-framed home and relocate the wooden beams on a truck across the new border separating the Soviet Union and Finland. The legend of the 'the man who refuses to die' remains a thorn in the side of the Soviet army, and a nameless KGB officer agrees to liberate high-ranking brute Igor Draganov from a Siberian prison in exchange for killing Aatami. Finnish action sequel, starring Jorma Tommila, Stephen Lang and Richard Brake

programme.title: The Choral (2025)
programme.desc: A choral society's male members enlist in the First World War, leaving the demanding Dr Guthrie to recruit teenagers and experience the joy of singing. Writer Alan Bennett's comedy drama, starring Ralph Fiennes, starring Roger Allam and Mark Addy

programme.title: Fuze (2026)

programme.desc: Documentary exploring the unsolved murder of Crimewatch presenter and newsreader Jill Dando, who was shot dead outside her house in Fulham, west London, in April 1999. Intense media coverage followed and several lines of enquiry were pursued, including a theory that she had been killed by a jealous ex-boyfriend and the idea that somebody had hired a hitman in revenge for a conviction linked to Crimewatch. Following a trial at the Old Bailey, 40-year-old Barry George was found guilty of Dando's murder, but a third appeal quashed his original conviction and resulted in his acquittal in 2009

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: The case of Jeremy Bamber, who was sentenced to life in prison for murdering his family in 1985, but decades later still maintains his innocence

programme.desc: A look at some of the most incredible escapes of the conflict, as captured soldiers, sailors and airmen on both sides dared the impossible to win their freedom. This episodes focuses on Colditz Castle, the Great Escape and the bold Warburg Wire Job

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts and Matt Williams visit archaeological digs across the country, beginning with a look at the work being carried out in the east of England. programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits archaeological digs around the country to discover what life was like during the Bronze and Iron ages before the Romans invaded. programme.title: Al Murray: Why Do the Brits Win Every War?
programme.desc: The presenter unpicks the Great British psyche and understand whether the Brits are helped or hindered by their experiences in war. In this episode, he is joined by proud Frenchman Fred Sirieix to separate the fact from the fiction of the Napoleonic wars. Was the battle of Waterloo really a great British victory or did Napoleon score an own goal? Were Nelson's tactics in the battle of Trafalgar genius or reckless? Were the British troops the pick of Europe, or did the French actually dance rings around them?

An investigation to bring Mercer and his gang to justice created tension in the area and caused untold pain to the family, but the perpetrator was eventually sentenced to 22 years behind bars and six other gang members were also jailed

programme.desc: The efforts of Norwegian resistance fighters to return to their invaded homeland to carry out a daring mission to raid and destroy a hydroelectric plant where the Germans were stockpiling a chemical needed for nuclear weapons research

programme.title: Digging for Britain

Fourteen chaotic, blood-spattered years later it was all over, Nero dying - perhaps by his own hand - at the climax of a rebellion against his rule

programme.desc: Tori Herridge and a team of scientists attempt to piece together the lives behind discovered bones, and find out what happened to these people and how they died. One of them is an old woman, who has been manipulated into a position where she is pointing at something. But at what? And why?

programme.title: River Hunters
programme.desc: River detectorist Beau Ouimette and presenter and keen swimmer Rick Edwards go in search of evidence of the clashing Scottish clans embroiled in the civil war that raged across the British Isles in the 17th century. Fights erupted during this period between the Royalists supporting the King and the Covenanters wanting more power for church and state. Starting on the River Lochy, situated in the shadow of Ben Nevis, the pair hunt for evidence of the 1645 Battle of Inverlochy - a pivotal fight that saw the Royalist army launch a surprise attack against the ill-prepared Covenanters

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Grumman Avenger, which was the most important carrier-based torpedo bomber on American and British carriers throughout the Second World War. They were also the biggest and heaviest carrier aircraft of the conflict

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Junkers Ju 52, which is considered one of the most famous airplanes in history. It was first designed as an airliner, but was used as a transport, bomber, and air ambulance during the Second World War

programme.title: Kevin Costner's The West
programme.desc: The lives of Protestant missionaries Marcus and Narcissa Whitman, who sought to spread their Christian faith and bring their way of life to the Cayuse people. They helped facilitate the colonisation of the Oregon Country via the Oregon Trail before ultimately being killed during an attack on the mission site in 1847

programme.title: Kevin Costner's The West
programme.desc: Cynthia Ann Parker, Naduah, Narua, or Preloch, was a woman who was captured, aged around nine, by a Comanche band during the Fort Parker massacre in 1836, in which several of her relatives were killed. The crime triggered a series of increasingly deadly confrontations between her Comanche captors and the newly independent Texas

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island

programme.title: Hazardous History with Henry Winkler
programme.desc: A nostalgic journey through America's past reveals shocking everyday activities and products that were once normal but are now unthinkable in modern society. programme.title: Hazardous History with Henry Winkler
programme.desc: The actor explores the thrilling world of vintage daredevils, from the 'human fly' to skateboarding speedsters and diving horses. These bold risk-takers chased adrenaline with unforgettable, dangerous stunts

programme.title: Hazardous History with Henry Winkler
programme.desc: A nostalgic journey through America's past reveals a time when any and all cures could be advertised and sold to the public indiscriminately, without any redress being offered when they failed. Henry dives into a world where animal skin could replace one's own and where doctors gave coffee enemas

programme.title: Hazardous History with Henry Winkler
programme.desc: The modern concept of extreme sports is a product of marketing, but in the past a lack of rules made them truly dangerous. The actor highlights some examples, from bone-crushing football and deadly baseball games to wild events like auto polo

programme.desc: Three hardcore mining teams battle it out on the one patch of gold-rich-land to see who can unearth the biggest nuggets and the most gold. Socialite couple Kimberley and Ritchie White make the tough decision to move from the Gold Coast to the mine to help out

programme.title: Gold Wars Downunder
programme.desc: Three hardcore mining teams battle it out on the one patch of gold-rich-land at the town of Clermont to see who can unearth the biggest nuggets and the most gold. There are nine weeks left of the gold season to go and the pressure is on. At Swiss Diggings, an unemployed Donnie begs owner Dennis for a new job

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts and Matt Williams visit archaeological digs across the country, beginning with a look at the work being carried out in the east of England. The presenters visit Norwich Castle Museum, where they find out about developments at Must Farm in Cambridgeshire, a hunt for Roman treasure in Colchester, a burial site at Abington, an Anglo-Saxon royal hall at Lyminge, the 16th-century Tudor Basing House, and a dig involving Emperor Nero at Silchester

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts and Matt Williams visit the Dorset Country Museum, where they explore finds from archaeological digs across the west of Britain. The presenters examine objects found at a Bronze Age burial site in Barrowclump, a Roman army site called Durotriges and the site of an early hospital at Winchester, Hampshire. Plus, a hoard found by metal detectors revealing hidden secrets of childhood 1,000 years ago, and a Roman settlement at Ipplepen in Devon

programme.title: The Other 300: Army of Lovers
programme.desc: Elite Greek army the Sacred Band, which was formed by the city of Thebes in 379BCE to defend itself from Sparta. Fighting for four decades undefeated, the army was annihilated by the forces of Philip II of Macedon and his son Alexander in the Battle of Chaeronea. Buried on the battlefield where they fell, the 300 were forgotten by history until a 19th century excavation uncovered their mass grave. However, the discovery was never published, and the evidence was lost. This documentary brings their story to light

programme.title: Secrets Declassified with David Duchovny
programme.desc: The actor steps inside secret spaces where history was shaped, from Churchill's bunker to hidden bases built to protect power in times of conflict

programme.title: The UnBelievable with Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: The former Ghostbuster turns his attention to unconventional weapons, from missiles manned by pigeons to a helmet outfitted with firearms to an incendiary device made to look like one of America's favourite pastimes

programme.title: Strange Evidence

programme.title: The UnBelievable with Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: The presenter explores the strange world of crime, featuring stories that both amuse and bewilder. Aykroyd sheds light on the details surrounding this unusual crime and its impact on history. Other examples include a thief who dressed as Santa Claus while making off with hundreds of dollars

programme.title: The UnBelievable with Dan Aykroyd

Some discoveries are anything but ordinary, such as severed feet on a beach, or finding evidence of a tiny otherworldly creature. Indeed, each is often weirder than the last

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise & Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: Hitler's government was firmly in the saddle in October 1934 and its anti-Jewish policy was supported by millions of Germans. Openly and publicly, Jews were discriminated against, disenfranchised, and persecuted. The indifference of many countries towards those Jewish refugees forced to leave Germany was evident

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise & Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: The invasion of Poland by the German army in 1939, examining how Hitler succeeded in pushing through his rearmament and war plans relatively unhindered

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise & Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: Hitler's invasion of the Soviet Union on June 22, 1941. His aim was to weaken Britain in Europe and gain 'lebensraum', or living space, in the East. The Nazi regime gradually advanced its so-called 'final solution to the Jewish problem' culminating in the appalling events associated with the Holocaust

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough employs the latest technologies to explore the violence, rivalries and deadly weaponry existing within the world of bugs. This first episode examines the survival tactics of its terrifying residents including killer ants, trap-setting spiders and beetles with the ability to shoot boiling chemicals at their enemies

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster continues his bug-eyed view of the world of creepy-crawlies, revealing how predators defuse the defences of their prey. Highlights include the cockroach wasp, busy preparing a tasty - and very live - treat for its young, the whirligig beetle, which employs a water-based radar system, and the jumping portia spider, which feeds on other arachnids

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A further selection of creepy-crawly close-ups, focusing on courtship in the bug world. Highlights include scorpions shaking their booty, the perfume-wearing nasonia wasp and the tropical cricket, for whom romance goes out of the window as it uses bribery to seal the deal with would-be partners. One potential partner to steer well clear of, however, is the praying mantis, the female of which is notorious for eating the male just after - or even during - mating. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A close-up view of sex, bug-style, as David Attenborough talks viewers through the different ways in which creepy-crawlies reproduce. Size matters for the minuscule male orb spider, creepily sneaking up on its intended and trying to mate without her noticing, while there's no rest for the lothario-like butterfly, which has plenty of notches on its proverbial bedpost. However, the harvestman spider has no use for sex at all, and reproduces by cloning itself

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough shifts the focus to bugs that prefer co-operation rather than conflict. They include burrowing cockroaches, the suitably named social spiders - which share a 30-metre web - the queen bee and her happy hive of workers and green ants pulling together to build a nest

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster concludes his close-up examination of the creepy-crawly world, shifting focus to the bugs' ultimate invention - the colony. Key residents of these minuscule mega-cities include honey bees, termites, leafcutter ants - who have a knack for farming - and their Argentine cousins, members of a community so vast it spans an entire continent

programme.title: David Attenborough's Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist examines the world of flight, travelling across the globe to chart the evolutionary story of those creatures who seemingly defy the rules of gravity by taking to the air. Initially focusing on insects, Attenborough meets a descendant of the dragonfly, before examining the Atlas beetle, which tends to restrict flight to times when it needs a mate or a fresh supply of food. More aesthetically pleasing is a group of beautiful tropical butterflies, followed by an in-depth study into the blow fly - the jet fighter of insects

programme.title: David Attenborough's Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist visits the jungles of Borneo to meet creatures that like to glide through life - the harlequin tree frog and the little-known colugo - often referred to, incorrectly, as a flying lemur. He also has a CGI-assisted encounter with the first true vertebrate flyer, the pterosaur, receives a flying lesson from a small flock of swans at Loch Lomond in Scotland and encounters the planet's largest species of bat

programme.title: David Attenborough's Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist turns his attention to creatures that dominate the skies today. He begins with the vast bird family, watching a group of vultures as they go scavenging and some peregrine falcons dive bombing for their prey. He then moves on to the floating forests of Ecuador to find out what makes the humble hummingbird tick, before ending his journey at the Gomantong bat caves of Borneo - a place he first filmed in 1972 - witnessing a mass exodus of the creatures

programme.desc: A visit to Saint-Pierre and Miquelon, one of the last remaining overseas territory of France, where semi-feral horses and ponies run wild

programme.title: The Wild Wild East
programme.desc: Many non-native species have staked a claim along the coast of Nova Scotia, but at White Point Beach Resort in Liverpool, rabbits have hopped in for an extended holiday

programme.title: The Wild Wild East
programme.desc: A single year, season by season, in the lives of the wildest animals of Canada's east coast

programme.title: Waterworld Africa
programme.desc: The secrets of the mighty Chobe River, which snakes through the African wilderness. An oasis during dry season, its vast flood plains are a magnet for wildlife

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Eighty-eight capuchin monkeys rescued from a research laboratory in Chile wake up to their first morning at the Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre in Dorset. Young chimp Rodders has trouble with a sticky melon, and the park's naughtiest resident, Seamus, comes face to face with alpha male Butch

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Wildlife vet John Lewis is given a run for his money as he tries to sedate two excitable chimps. The recently rescued male capuchins get used to life together, and orang-utan Kai proves too energetic for her companions

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Beni faces a day of reckoning, Alba is back in isolation, Pujon reclaims his role as gang leader and a team head out to rescue an infant orangutan

programme.title: Arctic Secrets
programme.desc: The dawn of the Arctic spring, when the sun rises above the horizon for the first time in months, bringing the region into life

programme.title: Gangs of Lemur Island
programme.desc: In Madagascar's remote Berenty Reserve, battle lines are drawn as two ring-tailed lemur gangs face the mounting challenges of the dry season. In the Ruins Gang, Crystal's reign of fear makes life hard for some of her subjects, while her rival gang queen Kati of the Museum Gang has found a good food supply for her crew

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Renard's life is saved by a mysterious woman, Monroe and Rosalee search for a way to restore Nick's powers, and Trubel spies on the creature behind the recent murders

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: A sulphurous mist spreads through a newly built skyscraper in the city with mysterious creatures lurking beneath that attack the employees. The situation tests the nerve of new operations manager Jenny Lewis as events inside unfold and the team races to rescue trapped executives before it is too late. Connor sets out to develop an anomaly detector for the team to use, while Abby takes an instant dislike to his latest love interest. Douglas Henshall and Hannah Spearritt star

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Abraham and some of the group head to Washington, DC, but face danger along the way when their transport fails, and they must find safety. However, not everyone in the team is on board with the new plan

programme.title: Britannia
programme.desc: Cait and her band continue their quest to reach Lucius because of his knowledge of the Spear. Hemple is furious that Veran seems to have got the better of her

programme.title: Britannia
programme.desc: Still searching for Lucius and his knowledge of The Spear, Cait takes the fight to the redoubt, and to all those who are waiting for her

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Gaby Roslin joins the team at the Old Hall Hotel, Cheshire, where a curious combination of baths, bees and books ensures that their stay is far from pleasant

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Medium Barrie John joins Yvette Fielding and the team at Oxford Castle, which was originally built for William the Conqueror and may house spirits trying to make contact

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and a team investigate reports of ghosts and poltergeist activity at an ancient building in Snowdonia

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Archer and Trip are lured by a terrorist to a desert-like planet, while T'Pol faces a tough decision when she takes command. Sci-fi drama, starring Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Hoshi grapples with a new language, while Archer, Trip and Reed all have mysterious encounters with femmes fatales. Fifth sci-fi series in the Star Trek saga, starring Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Part one of two. The ship is ordered to return to Earth after apparently causing the obliteration of an alien colony - until a surprise visitor offers startling new evidence about what really happened. Sci-fi series, starring Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Part two of two. Captain Archer is trapped in the 31st century, the Vulcans demand an end to Earth's space programme and Enterprise is on the verge of being overrun by Suliban. Sci-fi drama, starring Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: T'Pol relates a story of how her great-grandmother first contacted humans on Earth during the 1950s. Fifth sci-fi series in the Star Trek saga, starring Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew encounters a species in danger of extinction, presenting Janeway with a difficult decision. Sci-fi drama, starring Kate Mulgrew

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A deadly new species of Borg develops on board Voyager as a result of a fusion between the Doctor's holographic technology and Seven of Nine's nanoprobes. Sci-fi adventures, starring Kate Mulgrew and Jeri Ryan

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Voyager crew races against the Malon to build a vessel able to withstand the atmosphere of a gas giant, in order to retrieve a probe being pursued by their enemies. However, their plans suffer a setback when Torres is taken ill. Kate Mulgrew, Robert Beltran and Roxann Dawson star

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew makes a disturbing discovery when it learns Species 8472 are planning to invade Earth. Guest starring Ray Walston and Tucker Smallwood

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Tuvok and Paris are forced to crash-land the Delta Flyer, badly injuring crew member Samantha Wildman. While Voyager searches for the wrecked ship, Neelix tries to console the young ensign's daughter, Naomi. Starring Kate Mulgrew, Ethan Phillips and Scarlett Pomers

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The true motives of the Terminans are revealed as Rick and the group find themselves in a vulnerable situation trapped in a train car. Drama set in a post-apocalyptic world full of human zombies, starring Andrew Lincoln

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick leads a risky mission to a food bank known to be surrounded by walkers as the group's supplies run low, and the leader is unsure whether he can really trust those around him - including a priest named Gabriel the survivors meet on their travels

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group members come up against the Terminans once again - and must hatch a plan to gain the upper hand against their enemies. Gabriel realises they are sheltering at a nearby school, and Rick comes up with a plan for an ambush - to get rid of them once and for all

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Juliette undergo a ritual to restore his powers, but before he can be sure it has worked he is plunged into a case involving human sacrifice as a group of lizards uses a stretch of highway for a horrifying Wesen ritual

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: The Grimms go looking for Wesen at a local boxing club after the death of an ex-fighter. Chavez tries to recruit Trubel to a secret society, and Elizabeth joins Monroe and Rosalee in a search for a cure for Nick

programme.title: Britannia
programme.desc: Aulus struggles to remain in control now that Hemple is on the scene. The Druids are splintered by the betrayal of the Chosen One

programme.title: Britannia
programme.desc: Despite growing concerns from his inner circle, Aulus reluctantly follows Hemple's guidance to return to the Underworld and find a new link to Cait

programme.title: Britannia
programme.desc: Antedia and Lucius bond over their mutual wish for revenge. Lucius is recognised as a deserter by a Roman Escort after a tip-off from prisoners Rufus and Felix

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and a team of investigators visit Speke Hall, a Tudor manor in Liverpool where a ghostly white lady is said to roam the hallways

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Part one of two. Yvette Fielding and guest medium Brian Shepherd go ghost-hunting in the tunnels of Chislehurst Caves in Kent, a former mine that was used as an ammunition depot in World War One and an air raid shelter during World War Two

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding is joined by guest medium Barrie John as the team spend a night in the horrifying Pembrey Woods, haunted by tales of phantoms

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A salvage operation goes wrong, leaving the team members trapped on a Goa'uld mothership and when they accidentally activate the self-destruct mechanism, they have only 17 minutes to escape. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: O'Neill contracts a deadly virus from a woman who has been found frozen in ice near an Antarctic research station for thousands of years - and only a symbiote from the Tok'ra can save his life. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson and Amanda Tapping

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Carter, Teal'c and Jonas are sent to a seemingly sleepy seaside town on the Oregon coast to search for a scientist. They discover the community is hiding a sinister secret and eventually find an alien ship hidden in one of the buildings. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Colonel O'Neill is captured by the Goa'uld and tortured to the brink of death by Ba'al the System Lord - but help arrives in the form of old friend Daniel Jackson. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson and Michael Shanks

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Jonas convinces Pentagon officials that a sinister plot is afoot to destroy the people of his home planet. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: McKay is rescued from a Wraith ship with security officer Laura Cadman. However, an unforeseen technical malfunction causes their minds to become merged, and they are condemned to co-exist in the same body. David Hewlett and Jaime Ray Newman star

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team stumbles upon a planet whose inhabitants have a far superior technological know-how, and remain virtually untouched by the Wraith. As they head back to Atlantis, however, their craft is fired upon by a gang of criminals - and they are forced to make an emergency landing on a prison island. Joe Flanigan stars

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: McKay discovers a potent source of energy based on ancient technology, which he believes can be harnessed and put to profitable use. However, as he investigates the possibility further, he inadvertently places the rest of the team at risk

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Beckett creates a potion designed to convert Wraiths back to human form. The team is surprised to encounter a mysterious girl in the early stages of the experiment, and Sheppard's life is inadvertently put at risk

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team is mystified when Sheppard starts displaying enhanced physical strength and reflexes. Beckett runs tests on his DNA, which indicate he has been infected by his contact with Ellia - and is slowly transforming into a Wraith. Meanwhile, Weir asks Caldwell to take over the officer's duties. Joe Flanigan stars

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Beth wakes up in a hospital, but it soon becomes apparent those working there may not have her best interests at heart. She starts to work off her debt to the staff, but plots her escape with another worker called Noah - which is no mean feat as the area is surrounded by walkers

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Abraham and some of the group head to Washington, DC, but face danger along the way when their transport fails, and they must find safety. However, not everyone in the team is on board with the new plan

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick battles a creature made of living clay. Rosalee is troubled to discover many Wesen are angered by her engagement, and Trubel considers leaving town for her friends' sake. Meanwhile, the team makes a breakthrough regarding Nick's powers

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank are called to the scene of a crime where the suspect swears she was driven to madness by a talking wolf. Adalind continues searching for her daughter in Austria. Juliette learns she is the key to restoring Nick's powers, while Trubel is warned of a threat to her mentor's life

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: The team's new anomaly detector fails on its first outing when a paintballer is attacked at an adventure park. Refusing to accept the machine does not work, Cutter starts to think of a conventional explanation, while Connor disgraces himself by accidentally shooting the park's mascot. When the real culprit is revealed, the professor is forced to consider the possibility of human involvement as well as an anomaly. Guest starring Casualty's Gillian Kearney

programme.title: Britannia
programme.desc: Cait, Divis, Antedia, Ania and Phelan strike a deal with Hella, who is paid to reveal where Lucius can be found. Meanwhile, Amena tries to prove her worth to Hemple

programme.title: Britannia
programme.desc: Cait and Divis harness the power of Big Pebble in their search for the traitor. At the Villa, Hemple plans another feast to satisfy Lokka's hunger

programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team visit Inveraray Jail in Argyll and Bute, a 19th-century courthouse and prison reputedly haunted by the lost souls of convicts, vagrants and madmen

programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and Derek Acorah visit Pleasley Vale Mills in Bolsover, alleged scene of many paranormal events

programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and Derek Accorah carry out investigations in a Welsh castle and discover some unwanted residents

programme.title: Bee Movie (2007)
programme.desc: A bee wearies of a life dedicated to producing honey and decides to leave his hive. During his foray into the wider world, he befriends a florist. However, when he realises what becomes of the honey his species toils so hard to make, he resolves to sue the entire human race for stealing from his fellow creatures. Animated comedy, with the voices of Jerry Seinfeld, Renee Zellweger and Chris Rock

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice (2022)
programme.desc: A streetwise cat has the perfect money-making scam after finding a pipe-playing kid who has a horde of strangely literate rats. Animated adventure based on the Terry Pratchett story, featuring the voices of Hugh Laurie, Emilia Clarke and David Thewlis

programme.title: The Cinema List: Family Favourites
programme.desc: Discover some of the very best Sky Originals to watch with the whole family, from Monster Family to The Amazing Maurice

programme.title: The Hangover (2009)
programme.desc: Three men on a stag weekend in Las Vegas wake up after a night of heavy drinking and find they have not only misplaced the groom, but somehow gained a tiger and a baby. Unable to remember the details of the night before, they set about piecing the clues together in the hope of finding their missing friend. Comedy, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: The Hangover Part II (2011)
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Alan reunite in Bangkok for another stag weekend, but having learned the lessons of their previous misadventures, resolve to keep this one quiet and alcohol-free. Things inevitably do not go according to plan, and they must once again piece together the events of a wild night they cannot remember. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: The Hangover Part III (2013)
programme.desc: Drinking buddies Phil and Stu try to help their troubled friend Alan get his life in order, only to stumble into another bizarre misadventure. The Mob have taken Alan's brother hostage and to free him, they have to track down manic gangster Mr Chow, who has escaped from a Thai prison. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms, Zach Galifianakis and John Goodman

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A drug dealer is shot in a federal park and the team sets out to look for his killer, while Maggie's sister returns to New York and complicates the case

programme.title: Rain Man (1988)
programme.desc: Brash yuppie car dealer Charlie discovers his deceased father has left the family fortune to Raymond, the autistic elder brother he never knew he had. In a bid to get his hands on the money, he tracks down and abducts Raymond - but the ensuing cross-country journey proves to be a profound learning experience for them both. Oscar-winning drama, starring Tom Cruise and Dustin Hoffman, with Valeria Golino, Gerald R Molen and Jack Murdock

programme.title: Transatlantic Sessions - Togha agus Rogha
programme.desc: Julie Fowlis and Muireann Nic Amhlaoibh present highlights from two decades of Transatlantic Sessions. This episode features musical stars from Ireland, the UK and the US, including James Taylor, Phil Cunningham and Kathy Mattea. Ricky Skaggs and Sharon White sing Mansion on the Hill, while Dan Tyminski performs the popular traditional bluegrass song The Boy Who Wouldn't Hoe Corn. Plus, the much-missed Nanci Griffith performs a cover of Bob Dylan's Boots of Spanish Leather

programme.title: Carna an Cheoil agus na nAmhrán
programme.desc: For over a century, music collectors have flocked to Carna in Connemara, drawn by its rich Gaelic traditions. Here, songs, music, dance, and storytelling have been preserved, offering a rare glimpse into Ireland's ancient cultural roots. The echoes of those early collectors still linger in Carna today, and their recordings continue to shape its cultural identity. This programme examines Carna's vibrant heritage, exploring the treasures passed down through generations and meeting the new wave of locals proudly keeping their native culture alive today

programme.title: Cúramóirí
programme.desc: Documentary delving into the heart of daily Irish life, illustrating the crucial work and life saving care provided by family carers, professional carers and dedicated organisations to those who need it the most. Plus, the Ionad Lae in Gaoth Dobhair offers an insight into the services they provide

programme.title: Hector Caribbean
programme.desc: Hector Ó hEochagáin samples the tasty delicacies of Puerto Rico and explores the island's vibrant street art scene in the bustling capital of San Juan. He scores a slam dunk with a visit to a local basketball court and visits a pineapple farm, the key ingredient of the Caribbean's signature cocktail, the piña colada. Hector also gets to grips with the island's musical heritage as the home of reggaetón, and the birthplace of the smash hit tune 'Despacito' and superstar musician Bad Bunny

programme.title: 50/50 Heroes
programme.desc: Animated comedy series. On her last test, Sam got an B+ instead of an A++, which lowers her grade average to a mere A. She loses sleep over this, has nightmares, and even forgets to perform her beloved Hammy's evening ritual. When Sam realises what a dreadful state she's in, her mind is made up to ask the Spectral Sceptre for the power to enter computers to alter her grade average in Mr Brick's computer. At half-power, Sam behaves like a computer virus - and infects her teacher's computer

programme.title: 50/50 Heroes
programme.desc: Animated comedy series. Mr Brick has been on edge for several days, handing out punishments left and right and piling on the assignments - what's bitten him? The answer comes in just two words - Mrs Uptight! She is the regional head of the educational project The School of the Future and is visiting the school - which is acting as a pilot scheme - to see Mr Brick give a demonstration. When Mr Brick flees the demonstration, Mo and Sam have to find a solution to get Mr Brick to return.

programme.title: 50/50 Heroes
programme.desc: Animated comedy series. Amber organises a special lunch event in the cafeteria featuring a chicory-based menu to rehabilitate the underrated vegetable - to avoid eating it, Mo tells Amber that he's highly sensitive to chicory. Amber is impressed that he becomes super-strong whenever he eats some - to the extent that he's actually dangerous to people around him - and pleads with him to give a public demonstration of his amazing strength during a musical Super-Chicory-Show that she's putting on.

programme.desc: Social affairs documentary examining the challenges facing young people today. programme.desc: Members of the Cannon family, renowned singers from Donegal, embark on an unforgettable trip to Nashville. The Country Music Association festival, CMA Fest, offers Diane, John and Kelly the ideal opportunity to see established stars like Dolly Parton and emerging artists like Shaboozey. Speaking to Steve Earle, Tim O'Brien, John Mock, Maura O'Connell, Blanco Brown, Allie Colleen, Tayler Holder, Kelsey Hart and others, it becomes clear why Nashville holds the title of Music City

programme.title: Iománaíocht Hollywood
programme.sub-title: An Scéal sa mBaile (Gaelic Games in Irish Films)
programme.desc: Part two of two. The key role depictions of Gaelic games in the emergence of a distinctive Irish film culture. From the first indigenous feature film - Knocknagow (1918) - through the work of the National Film Institute of Ireland founded 1943, to recent Irish feature successes Lakelands (2022) and Róise and Frank (2022), Gaelic games have been a recurring and distinctive feature of Irish cinema

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Murder In The Family
programme.desc: The case of actress Gemma McCluskie, whose body was found in Regent's Canal. Dogged detective work and forensic examination led police to her brother.

programme.title: Britain's Almost Perfect Murders
programme.desc: The story of what happened when five people died at White House Farm. Jeremy Bamber framed his sister for the murders, but silencer forensics were his undoing.

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: The story of young man who is thrown from his vehicle onto a motorway after a tyre blowout in the fast lane. Elsewhere, a passer-by comes to the rescue of a woman on a canal boat.

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: Mountain rescue workers and a helicopter crew race to help a man who has fallen 200ft while hiking in the Cumbrian hills. Plus, a collision between two motor-biking brothers.

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: Two women fear the worst when their husbands become lost at sea on a fishing holiday, and a man risks his life when his elderly bedridden neighbour is trapped in a house fire.

programme.desc: The story of what happens when lifeboat crews rush to a woman who is injured on a luxury fort out at sea, while celebrating her wedding anniversary.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Deadly Taxi Driver

programme.desc: Professor David Wilson explores the case of Ian Stewart, who murdered his fiancée Helen Bailey, concealing her body for months before being convicted of murder.

programme.desc: Simon Toyne revisits a case involving an apparent suicide plot that unearthed in the rural villages of County Derry, when the bodies of a man and woman are found.

programme.desc: Jackie Malton explores the case of Myra Hindley and Ian Brady, the Moors Murderers, who killed five children in and around Manchester between 1963 and 1965.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: The Twilight Killers

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's UK Killer Evidence
programme.desc: The story of what happened when an attempt to detroy evidence and disguise the truth in New Cross was solved through forensic science.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A motorcycle shop owner for 17 years admits he didn't provide a much-needed estimate to family members trying to salvage an old bike.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A man sues his cousin for trashing their shared apartment with a baseball bat; his cousin admits to heavy drinking and not remembering what happened.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A struggling mother denies trying to scam the government when she hires a friend to take care of her four children

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A woman on disability sues the father of her child for a loan, money owed for a truck and property damage

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A woman sues her late mother's widower for the return of a truck; the legitimacy of his prison marriage to her mother is debated

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A woman pays over $5,000 for glamour shots of her grandchildren when her estranged daughter-in-law allegedly uses her credit card

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: The Judge has little patience for a landlord who takes payments in cash and only occasionally provides a receipt.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Ex friends dispute a fender bender after a leased vehicle is allegedly rented without full insurance coverage.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A woman demands payment for her broken-down car after her brother repairs it and gets it running.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: After a man loses his job, his relationship falls apart and he's sued for apartment damages caused by his dog.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Eastbourne's Dr Death
programme.desc: Geoffrey Wansell revisits how Eastbourne GP John Bodkin Adams befriended elderly patients, and was often named in their wills, as they died suspiciously sooner than expected.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Murder Without Motive
programme.desc: Outside Cromford railway station in Derbyshire, Senior Investigating Officer Tony Blockley and his team find a perplexing murder scene and launch an inquest.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Unravelling the Murder Of Janet Commins
programme.desc: The story of Janet Commins, whose body was discovered close to the small Welsh town of Flint in 1976. The investigation rocked the community.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Saturday Night Strangler
programme.desc: A look at the case of Joseph Kappen, who murdered three young women in South Wales in 1973.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: The Twilight Killers
programme.desc: Professor David Wilson explores one of the youngest incidents of matricide in UK criminal history, when two lovers conspired to murder two family members in Spalding.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: The Seaside Strangler
programme.desc: Geoffrey Wansell revisits the case of Stephen Akinmurele, who was charged with murdering five people in Blackpool and the Isle of Man, before committing suicide prior to trial.

programme.title: Britain's Countryside Killers
programme.desc: The story of Linda Casey, a 54-year-old horticulture lecturer from Coulsdon, whose body was discovered in Banstead Woods five days after she was reported missing.

programme.title: Killers: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: The story of Lauren DeWise, who was shot and killed by her abusive husband. This episode also covers the case of Cristina Ortiz-Lozano, who was stabbed to death.

programme.title: When Death Comes Knocking
programme.desc: When Robert Penn is murdered, it appears a stranger is responsible. But, a doorbell camera points to someone close to home.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest is asked to look after Lady Felicia's wayward niece Bunty, who soon finds herself suspected of murder. Starring Mark Williams, with Emer Kenny

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Mooney and the team become embroiled in the mysterious world of faith healing when a blind woman dies while being treated by renowned healer Steadman King. When it turns out the victim was poisoned, all eyes turn to Steadman and his cup of holy water. But how could the prime suspect have carried out the deed in front of an audience without anyone noticing? Meanwhile, JP is put through his paces when Pico the police dog joins the team on a week-long trial, and Florence tries to recreate some of Jack's home comforts

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: The Major Crimes team is forced to turn against Jesse when he becomes the prime suspect in a bank robbery

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A celebrated Toronto industrialist and philanthropist dies after being struck on the back of the head outside his home, and as Murdoch and Dr Ogden examine the forensic evidence, they conclude a young person may be responsible. Drama, starring Yannick Bisson and Helene Joy

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A hospital is terrorised by a hooded and robed figure with a crossbow, who is exacting revenge on medics he apparently believes responsible of malpractice. A medium tells Murdoch she has seen the murders in a vision, but is unable to identify the killer. Yannick Bisson stars

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After a strange telegraph is intercepted, Murdoch and Ogden are awoken by their old associate, Terence Meyers, who believes James Pendrick sent the message for Murdoch

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After the electrocuted body of a man is found, Murdoch and Brackenreid investigate a pair of researchers known as 'The Frankensteins' for their bizarre psychological studies

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch and Ogden's weekend at a country inn goes awry when a guest is murdered

programme.title: Miss Scarlet and the Duke
programme.desc: The unscrupulous boss of a new telecom company is accused of murder and wants Eliza and Nash to prove his innocence

programme.title: Miss Scarlet and the Duke
programme.desc: Eliza is on the trail of a fugitive who is charged with murder, and must find him before the police do or she risks losing everything

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: It seems money doesn't buy happiness when lottery winner Cherry is found dead at her luxurious villa, much to the horror of her husband and their visiting friends. As usual, Neville and the team are presented with a real head-scratcher when it turns out no one was in the house at the time - and the mystery deepens when the victim's body apparently vanishes into thin air. Meanwhile, JP is training unruly new officer Marlon, aware that his wife Rosey is due to give birth at any time. Kelvin Fletcher, Jason Manford and Faye McKeever guest star

programme.desc: The priest is asked to look after Lady Felicia's wayward niece Bunty, who soon finds herself suspected of murder. Starring Mark Williams, with Emer Kenny

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: When renowned concert pianist Pasha Verdinikov is shot dead during an apparent burglary, Neville is quick to conclude that the scene was staged and Pasha was murdered. However, matters are complicated when the discovery of new evidence links the crime to a case from 20 years ago. First of a two-part story, starring Ralf Little and Josephine Jobert

programme.sub-title: Murder on the Day of the Dead
programme.desc: It seems somebody has taken the island's Day of the Dead celebrations a little too literally when a man receives a voicemail from his wife saying she is being attacked. When she turns up dead, suspicion falls upon her friends and acquaintances at the nearby yacht club - her husband Finn, club secretary Charlotte and chairman Hugh. However, Jack's curiosity is piqued by a yellow butterfly found on the victim's clothing and he calls upon Commissioner Selwyn's knowledge of such matters. Caribbean whodunit, guest starring John Sessions and Pippa Haywood

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: When Frank receives an invitation to a murder mystery party, the team find themselves trapped with a killer in their midst

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: In the shadow of the Virtue Ministry, two controversial courtships continue. Watts is unnerved by the public's reaction to his liaison with Jack

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Trapped in elaborate puzzle rooms within an abandoned factory, Murdoch, Ogden, Crabtree and Brackenreid must escape or face horrific deaths

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.sub-title: The Dominion of New South Mimico
programme.desc: Murdoch investigates a murder at the Newsome Estate, which has declared itself a nation

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: An investigator arrives from Scotland Yard on the trail of infamous serial killer Jack the Ripper. Meanwhile, Murdoch takes dancing lessons so that he can escort Julia to a ball. Crime drama, starring Yannick Bisson as a Victorian sleuth

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The unveiling of a reconstructed dinosaur skeleton at a gala event leads to a murder inquiry after the dead body of a young man is found in its jaws. The detective finds himself embroiled in the world of bone-hunters as he attempts to track down the culprit. Yannick Bisson stars

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: After the body of Reginald Brody is discovered at the bottom of Helmsley Tower, Chief Inspector Valentine returns to Kembleford to investigate. Suspecting that there is more to his death than suicide, Valentine enlists Father Brown to help his inquiries. Mark Williams and Hugo Speer star in the crime drama

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Jane is taken into custody for fatally shooting the man he believed to be serial killer Red John, but bluffs his way out of jail and tries to exonerate himself. He begins by visiting his victim's widow - and learns her house contains not only a secret room, but also a reluctant guest. Starring Simon Baker

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: It's been over a year since Frank's death and Wendy, rediscovering a long lost love for painting, decides to create a very unique tribute to him in oils. The usually curmudgeonly Geoffrey seems very keen on the commemorative artwork, but Lee and Lucy simply hate it. Once it's hanging on their wall, the pair contrive to 'lose' the painting without Wendy or Geoffrey noticing. Comedy, starring Lee Mack, Sally Bretton, Deborah Grant and Geoffrey Whitehead

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: When Lee accidentally sends a rude text about Anna to Lucy, he makes the silly mistake of sending it to Anna herself. Lee and Lucy now face the impossible task of stealing Anna's phone and deleting the text before she read it. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton, with Abigail Cruttenden

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Comedian Josh Widdicombe, presenter Gemma Cairney, auctioneer Raj Bisram and fashion designer Sophie Hermann join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show.
